programme.desc: Police Lt. Joe Gliniewicz steals from a youth group and his death in the woods in Fox Lake, Ill., sparks a massive manhunt to find his killers.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: A famous Texas fruitcake bakery's accountant conducts a check writing scam; a self-proclaimed financial wiz rips off investors while he funds a professional race team with money stolen from his church.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: When all four members of the McStay family seemingly vanish into thin air, a yearslong quest for answers begins; a biker in the Mojave Desert finds the family members' bodies in shallow graves; a close friend of the family falls under suspicion.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: Crowdfunded charities are supposed raise funds for good causes, but some are actually scams.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Gon and his friends are surrounded by vipers inside a cave with no way out.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Gon goes up against Hanzo who easily overpowers him, but Gon refuses to surrender.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Gon wakes up in the infirmary and finds out he passed the exam.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Gon decides to go to Kukuroo Mountain to bring Killua back.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Determined to see Killua, Gon and the others say that they are Killua's friends, and ask the guard to relay that message...

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: To be able to see Killua, Gon and friends choose to go through the Testing Gate.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Gon departs on a journey to take the Hunter Exam and meets Leorio and Kurapika who also want to be Hunters.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: If Gon, Leorio and Kurapika cannot answer an old woman's question correctly, they will be immediately disqualified.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Escorted by the Kiriko the trio finally arrive at the exam site.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: The exam for the First Phase consists of following Satotz, the proctor to the site of the Second Phase.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Misty wetlands await the participants as they emerge from the long tunnel. Visibility is poor and various monsters lie in wait.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Proctors Menchi and Buhara's test consists of preparing a dish that will satisfy the palate of Gourmet Hunters.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Netero challenges Gon and Killua to a simple game. If they win, they earn the right to become Hunters.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: The airship arrives at the site of the Third Phase. To pass this test, entrants must reach the base of the tower within 72 hours.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Gon chooses the challenge where the person whose candle goes out first loses, but finds his candle has been tampered with

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Leorio loses patience as Kurapika refuses to deliver the final blow. An uneasy mood settles over the five as time continues to tick away.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: With the score at 2 wins, 2 losses, the final do-or-die match is entrusted to Killua.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: The five must vote and decide by majority rule on which path to take out of two.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: James Braxton and Raj Bisram set off in Cheshire. Raj hears why a group of daredevil playboys decided to drive their car in to the Savoy, and James learns why a pint in a pub played a vital role in verifying the quality of silver in 1773.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's a Welsh road trip for Kate Bliss and Paul Laidlaw. Some fake currency and a leg of mutton could cause problems for our pair of antiquers at a Somerset auction.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Kate Bliss and Paul Laidlaw forage for antiques across the West Country in a stylish 1960s Volvo. Paul's fortunes rest on a treasure from Africa while Kate blows a very, very big horn.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Paul Laidlaw resorts to tank warfare to crush Kate Bliss's chances of profit. Kate finds out about a decisive naval confrontation while Paul heads to Southampton to discover how Britain's landscape has been mapped for generations.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Paul Laidlaw and Kate Bliss hope to capitalize on some risky buys. Paul believes a strange collection of medals will honor him with profits, but will a pricey three-figure gamble purchase pay off for Kate?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Kate Bliss and Paul Laidlaw's final trip sees them through Kent. At an incredible auction in Bury St. Edmunds, the Antiques Road Trip record profit is truly smashed, and when the gavel finally goes down one expert is left close to tears.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Christina Trevanion and James Braxton are in the Scottish Borders with a '60s Jaguar. James resorts to a flashlight as he rummages in the dark for an occasional table while Christina hopes some silver-plated cutlery will serve up a profit.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Christina Trevanion and James Braxton's are in the cold and snowy Trossachs. James investigates some ancient treasures in a Glasgow graveyard and farmer's wife Christina learns why it was the Scots who transformed arable farming.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Christina Trevanion and James Braxton start in Levenshulme, Manchester. James has the unusual problem of having too much cash, while Christina struggles with her limited funds, deciding to gamble them on a worn toy train.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: The seaside town of Southport in Merseyside is Christina Trevanion and James Braxton's next stop. Christina dibs her way to a purchase with a Scouting connection and James spends a vast amount of his cash on two Cantonese jardinières.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: In Whitley Bay, Christina Trevanion and James Braxton set off on their finale. Christina buys a Chinese silver bowl and James has found six Japanese porcelain teacups. After their buying spree, they head to Ayr for a memorable auction.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Phil Serrell is joined by new Road Tripper Arusha Irvine on a jaunt around Herefordshire's antique shops in a 1976 Triumph Stag. Phil's joined by Daphne, his dog, while Roo finds a 300-year-old example of Georgian glass.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Road Trip regular, Phil Serrell, plays a safe bet with a mahogany breakfast table, while Arusha 'Roo' Irvine's all at sea, gambling on an antique pond yacht.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Roo Irvine and Phil Serrell explore Yorkshire and Derbyshire. Along the way they dig up coal mining musical history, Phil attempts to buy a horse and Roo picks up another piece of her favorite glassware.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Hugh Scully takes the experts to the gardens of Athelhampton House in Dorset, near to where the author Thomas Hardy was born. Finds include a valuable painting found in an attic, and a rare Scottish silver drinking cup.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Hugh Scully and a team of experts travel to Lowestoft, Suffolk, on Britain's east coast. Items include a Sèvres potty, which came from Woburn Abbey; and a traveler's calendar watch with seven subsidiary dials for different time zones.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: In the Victorian town of Oldham in Lancashire, finds include potentially valuable bookmarks, Roman toga pins unearthed by a metal detector, and three examples of work by LS Lowry – one of them on the back of a cigarette packet.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: At Clydebank, Glasgow, the surprises of the day include a pen-and-ink drawing of fairies by a celebrated Scottish artist; and a fine marine painting which caused a family fracas.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Hugh Scully takes his team of experts to Castle Howard, a 300-year-old stately home in North Yorkshire. Finds include an alabaster carving of Mary and Jesus, possibly dating from the 15th century; and an oil painting by a Royal Academician.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The show returns to Castle Howard in North Yorkshire to find out more about the stately home, while Hugh Scully presents three unseen items from previous shows.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Hugh Scully and a team of experts travel to Devonshire, to visit the south coast resort of Torquay, where Agatha Christie set many of her thrillers. Here they find a collection of photographs and memorabilia relating to the murderer Dr Crippen.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Hugh Scully and a team of experts visit Worcester Cathedral, where their discoveries include a stoneware pot for church wine that dates from the 17th century.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: At Winchester College, Britain's oldest school, Hugh Scully admires a collection of Georgian and Victorian jewelry found hidden in the drawer of a boxed gentlemen's travelling set and a rare album of Indian watercolours from the 1820s.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Hugh Scully and the team head out to Morpeth in Northumberland, where family treasures brought along for evaluation include a richly engraved glass vase, a pre-war tin-plated Mickey Mouse, two fine paintings of Venice, and a charming old love token.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Antiques featured in this programme from Llanelli in Wales include two Minton Majolica urns left by an impoverished naval captain, a brass monocular microscope, and an old collection of comics.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: In the historic Lincolnshire town Grantham (birthplace of Margaret Thatcher), finds include two letters from CS Lewis, a valuable opal necklace, and a selection of Edwardian silk stockings.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: More famous for its TT races than its antiques, the Isle of Man nevertheless yields some interesting discoveries, including a rare enamel bowl used as an ashtray and a battered motorbike.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: In the grounds of Castle Ashby, home of the Duke of Northampton, Hugh Scully and the experts sort through more treasures brought along by eager fans.

programme.title: Operation Wild
programme.desc: Vets in China keep baby pandas alive; an operation in Cameroon that could transform the life of Shufai the gorilla; an elephant in Laos with a gunshot wound gets an X-ray at a human hospital.

programme.title: Operation Wild
programme.desc: A rhino's groundbreaking skin-graft operation; an orangutan has micro-surgery to try to restore her sight.

programme.title: Operation Wild
programme.desc: Extreme dentistry on a five-ton elephant; keyhole surgery on a giant tortoise; an invention may help a dolphin swim.

programme.title: Snow Chick: A Penguin's Tale
programme.desc: The tale of a penguin chick's early, fragile months on the ice.

programme.title: The Wonder of Animals
programme.desc: The penguin's anatomy allows it to conquer a wide range of habitats, from forests to tropical waters, cities and even Antarctica.

programme.title: The Wonder of Animals
programme.desc: Specialized adaptations have enabled bears to thrive in extreme conditions, from tropical jungles to the Arctic Ocean.

programme.title: The Wonder of Animals
programme.desc: Anatomy and physiology allow for big cats like the leopard, snow leopard, jaguar and lion to stalk, capture and kill their prey.

programme.title: The Wonder of Animals
programme.desc: The population and geographical range of the fox has expanded, due to the animal's senses, intelligence and flexibility.

programme.title: The Wonder of Animals
programme.desc: The anatomy and physiology of the elephant -- the largest land animal on the planet -- allows them to defy the extreme heat of the desert and find food and water in barren landscapes.

programme.title: The Wonder of Animals
programme.desc: The evolution of the great ape brain, which scientists deem one of the most complex brains on the planet.

programme.title: The Wonder of Animals
programme.desc: A crocodile hunt from ambush to the kill; a crocodile's circulatory system enables them to hold their breath underwater for more than an hour, while sensitive skin detects prey through water.

programme.title: The Wonder of Animals
programme.desc: The innerworkings of dolphin echolocation; strategies used by orcas during a hunt.

programme.title: The Wonder of Animals
programme.desc: The anatomy, physiology and senses of bats enable them to thrive in surprising places.

programme.title: The Wonder of Animals
programme.desc: Various ways in which snakes use their bodies to climb, fly and swim; snakes use senses to hunt; venom.

programme.title: The Wonder of Animals
programme.desc: Birds of prey dominate other birds in strength, maneuverability and speed; the bald eagle's talons and sharp eyes enables it to fixate on its prey and surroundings at the same time; pop-up feathers on peregrine falcons allow for their speed.

programme.title: Natural World
programme.desc: The animal kingdom possesses a fearsome arsenal, a variety of extreme weapons used in epic battles to gore, stab, crush and batter. For Professor Doug Emlen, it has been his lifetime's ambition to discover the secrets of nature's arms races.

programme.title: The Natural World
programme.desc: After the loss of her father Helen Macdonald trained the hardest bird in falconry, a goshawk. The cathartic experience helped her to grieve and now she is ready to do it again. Helen trains a new bird and follows a wild goshawk family at the nest.

programme.title: Natural World
programme.desc: On 12 September 2015, a 30-ton humpback whale breached and landed on Tom Mustill and friend Charlotte Kinloch as they paddled a sea kayak in Monterey Bay, California. Both survived, but Tom wonders if the whale was deliberately trying to hurt them.

programme.title: Raymond Blanc's Kitchen Secrets
programme.desc: Chef Blanc celebrates the season with a winter vegetable salad featuring beetroots, a celeriac puree served with a crisp-skinned roast wild duck with blackberry sauce and watercress soup.

programme.title: Raymond Blanc's Kitchen Secrets
programme.desc: Chef Blanc uses two seasonal ingredients, game and mushrooms, to create a French version of a pasty called pithivier, which is filled with a rich mix of pheasant, chestnuts and dried fruits; he also makes a cep mushroom tortellini with fresh pasta.

programme.title: Raymond Blanc's Kitchen Secrets
programme.desc: The miracle of yeast helps Raymond to create a French classic: brioche; he gets down to basics with a French country bread recipe that's essential for any baker to add to their repertoire; lastly, he makes a spectacular apple croustade.

programme.title: Raymond Blanc's Kitchen Secrets
programme.desc: Chef Raymond Blanc combines the universally popular ingredients of egg and cheese to make a classic omelette with a secret technique; he then uses a Comte from his home region in France to make a family-style souffle.

programme.title: Raymond Blanc's Kitchen Secrets
programme.desc: Chef Blanc focuses on tomatoes, opening with a simple salad recipe inspired by his mother; he also makes a creamy risotto, stuffed tomatoes glazed with cheese and a series of ices and sorbets to cleanse the palate with elegance.

programme.title: Raymond Blanc's Kitchen Secrets
programme.desc: Chef Blanc celebrates the best of British shellfish as he cooks dishes including Moules Mariniere, seared squid salad and Scottish lobster.

programme.title: Raymond Blanc's Kitchen Secrets
programme.desc: Chef Raymond begins with a feather-light lemon tea cake, coated in an apricot jam and tangy lemon glaze; he also makes a choux pastry filled with chocolate cream and covered with a chocolate icing; lastly, the secrets to the perfect macarons.

programme.title: Raymond Blanc's Kitchen Secrets
programme.desc: Chef Blanc shares his favorite lamb dishes: lamb liver with caramelized potatoes and French seasoning, a slow-roasted garlic and herb lamb shoulder with potato and turnip gratin and lamb provencal with ratatouille.

programme.title: Raymond Blanc's Kitchen Secrets
programme.desc: Raymond celebrates his passion for puddings, cooking dishes including riz au lait, tarte tatin and fruit crumble.

programme.title: Raymond Blanc's Kitchen Secrets
programme.desc: Chef Raymond shares his love of charcuterie, beginning with thin slices of duck cured in herbs and juniper berries; also, he makes a chicken liver parfait and a meaty pot-au-feu medley; lastly, a ham hock terrine served with home-made pickles.

programme.title: Raymond Blanc's Kitchen Secrets
programme.desc: Drawing upon his travels through Asia, Raymond creates dishes full of fragrant spice and fiery heat.

programme.title: Raymond Blanc's Kitchen Secrets
programme.desc: Raymond demonstrates the versatility of the summer's juiciest fruits with a simple but impressive berry-strewn pavlova and a spicy cherry clafloutis sees the vibrant fruit cushioned in a bed of soft, sumptuous pastry.

programme.title: Raymond Blanc's Kitchen Secrets
programme.desc: Raymond celebrates the freshest summer greens, beginning with a simple yet vibrant pistou soup, laden with summer vegetables and bursting with basil, topped with crispy croutons and meltingly rich parmesan.

programme.title: Raymond Blanc's Kitchen Secrets
programme.desc: Chef Raymond Blanc creates four mouth-watering chocolate recipes: a simple mousse, rich chocolate delice, fondant with a melting middle, and his signature dessert: cafe creme, which is a chocolate-sculpted cup filled with a mousse and coffee sabayon.

programme.title: Raymond Blanc's Kitchen Secrets
programme.desc: Raymond dives into the world of fish with the underused and affordable mackerel; he creates a light meal of grilled mackerel with a soy lime dressing.

programme.title: Raymond Blanc's Kitchen Secrets
programme.desc: Chef Raymond Blanc looks to the UK's favorite fruit, apples, for inspiration; he returns to memories of childhood with a simple tart made with a foolproof pastry and custard filling.

programme.title: Dr. Phil

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues with Megan, her ex-boyfriend, Andy and his fiancee Caitlin, who have presented Dr. Phil with evidence supporting their allegation that it is Megan's own lifestyle & choices keeping her out of her son's life. Who is telling the truth?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Marissa, 22, says her family treated her like an outcast in childhood & she later began working as an escort to make ends meet. Marissa faces family for the first time in 3 years on Dr. Phil's stage. Did they indeed reject her & is there hope for repair?

programme.title: Dr. Phil

programme.title: Dr. Phil

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Julia & daugther Olivia, now 22, say Olivia's newborn daughter was taken illegally. Jyllian, who adopted Olivia's daughter, promised to provide pictures of the little girl & an opportunity to be part of her life. Jyllian says the adoption was legal. Pt. 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: In 2012, Amanda accused her ex-husband, George, a U.S. Army veteran, of molesting her then 7-year-old daughter, & he was sentenced to life in prison. George's parents, Harold and Cindy, believe their son was wrongfully convicted.

programme.title: Dr. Phil

programme.title: Dr. Phil

programme.title: Dr. Phil

programme.title: Dr. Phil

programme.title: Dr. Phil

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: On Facebook, unexpected things happen, like reuniting with a loved one or being fired after posting an inappropriate photograph. It can also be a lifesaver, offering a human connection when all seems lost. Dr. Phil delves into a story that made headlines.

programme.title: Dr. Phil

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Después de encontrar el cuerpo de un teniente de la Marina escondido debajo de un camión de 18 ruedas, el equipo de NCIS rastrea las ubicaciones anteriores del vehículo para identificar la escena del crimen y al sospechoso.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo de NCIS vincula una extraña escena del crimen en el Cementerio Nacional de Arlington con una serie de ataques contra veteranos sin hogar.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Cuando la ciudad de Nueva York experiencia un gran apagón, los policías se esfuerzan a contener el caos. Frank después descubre algunas verdades desagradables sobre su departamento.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Danny y Baez investigan un intento de asesinato contra un famoso médico de fertilidad. Eddie es llamado para intervenir en un asunto familiar de los Reagan que involucra a los hijos de Danny.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Eddie y su nueva pareja, Maya, se enfrentan con Jamie en el trabajo cuando no intervienen en una disputa pública en una tienda de conveniencia.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Las cosas se vuelven personales para Danny cuando Luis Delgado, el sicario del cartel de la droga responsable de incendiar su casa, reaparece.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando 25 años después se abre una cápsula del tiempo en un pequeño pueblo de Colorado y contiene una revelación espantosa, la UAC investiga ese crimen y un posible vínculo con la muerte de un oficial de policía local.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: El UAC viaja a Rapid City después de que dos víctimas masculinas se descubren muertas por un ritual. Reid continúa lamentando la muerte de Maeve.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC viaja a Los Ángeles en búsqueda de un sospechoso que secuestra niñeras y niños que cuidan el mismo día cada año.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC se dirige a Detroit cuando las parejas son asesinadas y metidas en sus coches. Mientras tanto, el esposo de Blake se lo cuenta todo.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Ziva sorprende a Gibbs con una advertencia críptica, lo que lo lleva a preguntarse por qué permaneció bajo tierra durante años mientras familiares y amigos la daban por muerta, y qué la llevó a regresar, en el estreno de la temporada 17.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Con sus vidas en peligro, la investigación deshonesta de Gibbs y Ziva da un giro inesperado cuando se revela un posible complot terrorista.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Después de encontrar el cuerpo de un teniente de la Marina escondido debajo de un camión de 18 ruedas, el equipo de NCIS rastrea las ubicaciones anteriores del vehículo para identificar la escena del crimen y al sospechoso.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man crashes a stolen vehicle into a house, a woman who took a cell phone video of her ex explains the dispute to officers, and a man is stopped for suspected trespassing.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A female victim tells the officers that two men kicked in her front door. Three suspects attempt to steal a bicycle in an alley. Following routine questioning of a petrified wife, officer arrests the husband for domestic abuse.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers respond to a traffic dispute involving an assault with a tire iron. Police are led to a battered woman after she dials 911. Officers on patrol encounter a couple engaged in prostitution.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A foot pursuit ends in arrest after a suspected drug dealer attempts to discard his goods. Police are called to a warehouse after the security guard is held at gunpoint. Police assist a young girl after being struck by a car.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A traffic stop leads to an altercation with an armed passenger, a man is accused of assault while searching for marijuana, and a woman on probation has mismatched plates.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies catch up to a group of teenagers enjoying a night of joyriding. A traffic stop opens the doors to recovery for a very repentant suspect. A suspect insists his car is not stolen because he did his online research.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: The owner of a truck discovers what happens when you don’t lock your door. Police level with a troubled man and implore him to make better choices. An officer acts as a therapist for multiple people and their relationships.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: When one of the officers attempts to grab a suspect, the suspect unexpectedly assaults the officer in an attempt to avoid arrest. An officer responds to a stabbing. An officer is flagged down by a concerned group looking for a missing child.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man refusing to drop his knife tests an officer's patience, neighbors hold an alleged thief until police arrive, and a couple of volatile newlyweds need police intervention.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A stabbing victim has his throat slashed while waiting for his wife. A man is shocked to learn that his rental box truck was reported stolen. Spice is found in a nervous passenger's purse.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A business owner flags down officers when an erratic man starts climbing on his car. Unusual circumstances allow officers to cut a driver some slack for being honest. A man forgets to return a car after running errands.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A passenger flees during a traffic stop, deputies respond to a heated dispute between roommates, and an officer encounters an armed suspect.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers track down a suspect who eluded them earlier, a suspicious vehicle takes off at the sight of police, and a man gets busted for possession in front of his mom.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers respond to a call that a man shot up his parents' house, a fleeing suspect hopes a change of clothes will fool the police, and a shaky hit-and-run story unravels.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers engage in a high-speed chase with a motorcycle going 100mph. A Florida man becomes verbally abusive with a woman and her mother. Police arrest a man who is pulled over for expired tags and end up seizing a rifle and 20 rounds of ammo.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man flees from cops and reaches a dead end. A 40mm impact round is used to gain compliance when he reaches for his pockets. A man claims his anger got the best of him during an armed robbery.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: After deputies pursue a car-theft suspect to his home, he tries to convince them he has been there all along, and a man violates a protection order to try to reconcile with his wife.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A mother with an arrest warrant is apprehended after trying to evade police, a repeat traffic offender commits multiple offenses, and cops respond to a domestic abuse case.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An open container and crack pipe are discovered inside a teen's vehicle. Officers find a man at a nearby residence lifting weights after trying to evade police. A fight involving two men and a shovel is broken up.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers encounter an unusual situation where the victim and suspect have barricaded themselves inside the house. Officers respond to a domestic dispute at a nearby apartment complex. A man explains how his ex-girlfriend climbed into his window.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers respond to a call reporting an officer involved in a fight. A brazen female driver careens into a ditch after failing to yield. A berserk woman is pulled over for her erratic driving, she is eventually handcuffed but not without a fight.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police go off-roading to follow a stolen car, a man has odd excuses for having suspicious items, and an officer settles a dispute between a wife and her jealous husband.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man riding a bike at night with no lights decides to take off rather than talk with police, and a dangerous domestic dispute unfolds on the streets of Texas.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A pair of suspects on the run pretend they were busy napping. A man reaches for something in his pocket, but denies knowing what it is. A family calls the police after their roommate brandishes a gun.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A woman bites both the arresting officer and a store manager after getting caught stealing beer. The passenger of a suspicious vehicle is caught attempting to hide drugs in the seat. Police respond to a domestic abuse call involving a knife and two women.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect sends police on a high-speed chase, a wanted man attempts to flee from officers on a bicycle, and security cameras catch a man trying to conceal items in his pants.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A biker with a history of stealing vehicles doesn’t know how to drive his motorcycle. A man in- between jobs takes up a sketchy method of earning money. Deputies strongly question the legitimacy of a man’s work van.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates two unusual cases, one involving the suspicious death of a go-cart racer who took his hobby to the highway and paid the price with his life, and a murder at a hip new restaurant where patrons dine in the dark.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates the murder of an entire family, except for one daughter, who supposedly is possessed by the devil.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and his team discover a young man strangled to death by hanging ...whose body looks like that of a woman.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team goes behind the scenes at a horror porn film studio to investigate the murder of a slasher film actress murdered on the set of one of her movies.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: In Part One of a Two-Part crossover episode to conclude on Without A Trace, a kidnap victim from New York who went missing six years ago may be the same boy whose death Grissom and the CSI team are investigating in Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A suspect from Sara's past returns, causing her to question her future as a CSI.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Warrick's addiction to pills begins to impact his job when his investigation into the underground mob in Vegas results in him being targeted as the prime suspect in a mob-related murder case.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Hodges has ulterior motives when he stages hypothetical murders in the lab to give his colleagues a chance to play CSI.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and his team delve into the world of illegal dog fighting to find out who is responsible for the death of a wealthy socialite.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and his team investigate two murders that take place at the annual bull riding rodeo in Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and his team battle the flu when they are called upon by DDA Klein to investigate the deaths of several key witnesses for a grand jury case against a dangerous Las Vegas gang.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The disturbing death of a 3-year-old girl has a great impact on Catherine as she searches for clues to her murder.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Brass and Nick get help from an unlikely source, an incarcerated criminal (Method Man), when investigating two murders that take place in the same apartment building.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and his team discover several victims who have green blood, leading them to the conclusion that their deaths are somehow connected.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Una madre que se pensaba que estaba de duelo por la pérdida de su familia hace tres años se convierte en sospechosa en una investigación de CSI.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI debe investigar a uno de los suyos cuando Langston es acusado por un antiguo colega de ser parte de los asesinatos del Dr. Jekyll. Primera parte de dos del final de temporada.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Las vidas del equipo de CSI están en juego a medida que se acercan al escurridizo Dr. Jekyll, y es posible que más de un miembro del equipo no viva para ver su captura. Segunda parte del final de temporada.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Langston lucha por su vida después de ser apuñalado por un psicópata, Nate Haskell, mientras que los otros CSI asisten a un funeral que se vuelve mortal.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: La histeria se produce cuando un tiburón ataca a una mujer en la piscina de un casino de Las Vegas. El equipo de CSI debe determinar si el asesino es humano o tiburón.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Una convención de vampiros y hombres lobo está en el corazón de una investigación del asesinato en Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Sqweegel, un asesino en serie que está castigando a los héroes locales que albergan secretos ocultos, está a la caza en Las Vegas..

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Una mujer que sufre de una condición llamada "acumulación" se convierte en sospechosa de asesinato cuando se encuentra un cadáver enterrado bajo pilas de basura y escombros dentro de su casa.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando un estudiante universitario termina muerto después de un espectáculo de "Caminar con dinosaurios", el equipo de CSI debe determinar si su muerte fue un asesinato o un accidente.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando el equipo de CSI descubre los restos destrozados de un hombre, se encuentran con múltiples sospechosos que pueden ser responsables de su muerte.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Dos hombres son asesinados justo antes de exponer a una compañía de gas natural por envenenar a residentes en una ciudad agrícola. Ahora el equipo CSI debe descubrir quién es responsable de sus muertes.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: La caída fatal de un hombre desde el balcón de un hotel lanza al equipo de CSI a una investigación para determinar si su muerte fue suicidio o el resultado de un juego sucio.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Los CSI se propusieron localizar a un pedófilo sospechoso de asesinar a la esposa de un agente del FBI y secuestrar a sus hijos.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando una foto aparentemente falsa de una prostituta muerta aparece en línea, el equipo de CSI sigue una pista para encontrar a la mujer que fue asesinada.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A bizarre murder of a South Beach club owner turns out to be a script where art is imitating life. Horatio and the CSI team investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio’s longtime criminal nemesis Walter Resden surfaces once again, and Caine is determined to finally bring him to justice.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Alex campaigns against a sex offender who moves into her neighborhood and then becomes embroiled in controversy when the man is murdered soon thereafter.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: What begins as a case of apparent Road Rage leads the CSI team to the investigation of a stolen $4 million necklace, which is tied to a murder.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a white supremacist is acquitted for the murder of his wife after learning she is racially mixed, it’s up to Horatio to bring the killer down.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A band of masked gunmen invade an upscale spa, with the female customers' luxury cars as their booty. A customer is injured in the melee.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The bodies of two men, shot execution-style, are discovered in an abandoned hotel slated for demolition. Horatio and the CSI team investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A cell phone call leads the team to investigate a kidnapping that, unless they reach the victim before it’s too late, could soon become a murder.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A young, ultra-glam heiress and media darling is found electrocuted in her bathtub during a party, and there is no shortage of suspects.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: While investigating the disappearance of a cruise ship passenger, the team discovers that a murder has also taken place on the ship.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The CSI Team is on high alert when the deadly Mala Noche gang initiates a shooting rampage during the trial of one of their members.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio’s search for Antonio Riaz continues. The Feds take over the lab and investigate each team member when $12,000 is missing from a drug bust.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: In pursuit of Marisol's killer, Horatio and Delko go to Brazil to avenge her death. In Rio, they are close to catching Riaz, Marisol's killer.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a male model is murdered, Horatio and the CSI team must enter the high stakes world of modeling in order to find the killer.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando un chofer de camión de reparto y un ama de casa de su ruta son asesinados, Horatio Caine y el equipo de CSI intentan encontrar una conexión.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Un presidiario fugitivo toma a Natalia como rehén y le cuenta un secreto impactante sobre sus crímenes. Horatio Caine y el resto del equipo de CSI investigan.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio Caine ha decidido proteger a un luchador de artes marciales mixtas de su peligroso hermano que recientemente se escapó de la cárcel.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando el equipo de CSI encuentra a una universitaria muerta en un jacuzzi, investiga un caso marcado por celos, psicosis y compañeros de cuarto de la universidad.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando Horatio Caine persigue a un misterioso sospechoso de asesinato, descubre que toda la vida del hombre es una elaborada farsa.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Después de que Horatio captura al último fugitivo de la cárcel, su avión de transporte realiza un aterrizaje forzoso y se descubre que el fugitivo tiene planeado algo más que una fuga.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Las vidas de Horatio y Natalia penden de un hilo mientras Horatio se interpone entre Natalia y una muerte segura.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Tieso (S10 Ep2)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI se adentra en el mundo sexy de los gigolós cuando descubren un arma homicida poco común.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Un tornado pasa por encima de una escena de un crimen, daña la evidencia y pone a Ryan y Walter en grave peligro.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: El equipo persigue a un asesino sádico que les quita los ojos a las mujeres y un nuevo archienemigo desafía a Horatio.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio protege a una jefa de la policía mexicana del misterioso asesino que mató a su esposo.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: En una mansión desierta, el equipo de CSI encuentra un cuerpo colgando que parece haber sido asesinado por un vampiro.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Un asesino enmascarado interrumpe un juego de póquer de altas apuestas y deja a un jugador muerto y desconcertado al equipo de CSI.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando Horatio encuentra otro cadáver al que le faltan los ojos, todo apunta a su archienemigo, el Atormentador, pero él tiene una coartada irrefutable.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When Mac is shot, he finds himself in limbo between life and death, as he fights for his life, it’s up to his team to bring the shooter to justice.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate when a fire chief – a friend of Mac’s – is killed in a blaze that used the same technique as a recently paroled arsonist.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI New York team rushes to stop serial arsonist Leonard Brooks after he begins using fire against people from his dark past.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Evidence found in photos at a crime scene on the Brooklyn Bridge sends Mac and Jo to San Francisco in search of a missing teenage girl.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI New York team of investigators race to catch a shooter when Lindsay is injured during the attempted murder of a political candidate.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac investigates a 20-year-old case involving a missing boy when the prime suspect is found murdered on the anniversary of the boy’s disappearance.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate a twisted fairy tale when a woman in a ball gown is found at the bottom of the pond outside Belvedere Castle in Central Park.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a psychiatrist’s patients are being systematically murdered, the CSIs are forced to play along in a game of Clue in order to catch the killer.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSIs must delve into the high-pressure world of elite prep schools when a student is murdered while studying for the SAT’S.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When Det. Lovato’s cover is inadvertently blown, the CSI's investigate the Latin street gang she infiltrated when undercover.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI New York team investigates a 1920s-inspired speakeasy when one of its owners is murdered and $10,000 goes missing.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI New York team is confronted with a puzzling mystery when two different victims are linked by the same unusual weapon.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a beloved off-duty NYPD officer perishes in a robbery, the CSIs use the art of interrogation to break down their suspects and get to the truth.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate when a masked man is found at the bottom of a notorious skyscraper known for its history of mysterious deaths.

programme.title: CSI: New York: ¡Déjenme salir! (S8 Ep6)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga cuando una broma de fraternidad en el Día de Brujas sale mal y un maestro de ceremonias es dado por muerto en una tumba abierta.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Juego siniestro (S8 Ep7)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga cuando la noticia de una fiesta en una escuela secundaria se vuelve viral, lo que da lugar a una aglomeración, un porche colapsado y la muerte de una adolescente.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Intercepción (S8 Ep8)
programme.desc: Mientras el equipo de CSI de Nueva York investiga el asesinato de un juez, Jo se encuentra cara a cara con un criminal de su pasado.

programme.title: CSI: New York: 48 horas antes (S8 Ep9)
programme.desc: Cuando un testigo importante aparece muerto, Jo se ve envuelta en la peligrosa investigación del presunto violador que liberaron cuando ella trabajaba en Washington D.C.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Sin rastro alguno (S8 Ep10)
programme.desc: Un cuerpo carbonizado se convierte en un desastre para el equipo de CSI cuando comienza a parecer que un luchador de artes marciales mixtas ha sido asesinado por su acosador.

programme.title: CSI: New York: ¿Quién está ahí? (S8 E11)
programme.desc: Una investigación de violación de domicilio se vuelve más complicada cuando la familia de la víctima resulta ser menos perfecta de lo que parecía originalmente.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Brooklyn hasta la muerte (S8 E12)
programme.desc: Un juego de rol se vuelve letal cuando un jugador es víctima de un asesino auténtico y el otro es secuestrado para pedir un rescate.

programme.title: CSI: New York: El efecto dominó (S8 Ep13)
programme.desc: Cuando el equipo de CSI investiga dos muertes aparentemente sin relación, sus rastros separados de evidencias conducen a una conclusión que sorprendentemente las vincula.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Fin del juego (S8 Ep14)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI se encuentra inmerso en el mundo de los videojuegos competitivos cuando descubre que un asesinato puede estar relacionado con un torneo de altas apuestas.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Caso cerrado (S8 Ep15)
programme.desc: Asesinan a un técnico de laboratorio en un caso que se parece a otro sin resolver de la década de 1950, el equipo de CSI vislumbra lo que sucede en las sombras del laboratorio.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Salud (S8 Ep16)
programme.desc: Una ola de brutalidad amenaza a una pequeña comunidad de la ciudad de Nueva York cuando encuentran un cuerpo descuartizado y estratégicamente abandonado en cuatro esquinas.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Obsequio de cumpleaños (S8 Ep17)

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Ellos pensaron que el incendio cubriría su crimen. Pero una pequeña pista, no más grande que una tachuela, permaneció allí. Contenía toda la información que los investigadores necesitaban para poner a un trío de asesinos a sangre fría tras las rejas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el 2004, la estudiante de enfermería Tamika Huston desapareció de su hogar en Spartanburg, Carolina del Sur. Una pista llevó a los detectives a su auto y encontraron una llave de una casa desconocida que podría ayudar a resolver el caso.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La policía sospecha del Dr. John Jack Boyle en la desaparición de su esposa, Noreen, cuando firma los papeles de la hipoteca de una nueva casa con una mujer que se hace pasar por su esposa.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el año 2000, Judy Southern llegó a casa del trabajo y recibió un disparo de un hombre armado que esperaba dentro. Su esposo llegó poco después, llamó a los servicios de emergencia y la llevó al hospital.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una mujer fue brutalmente asesinada en su casa y los únicos testigos del crimen fueron los perros de la familia.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Una pastilla amarga para tragar

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1984, el cuerpo de la universitaria Laura Salmon fue encontrado en una granja de Tennessee, cubierto con sus propios jeans y los jeans del asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1980, Shannon Mohr, residente de Michigan, murió en lo que su nuevo esposo, David Davis, reportó que fue un accidente al montar a caballo. Después de su muerte, la familia de Shannon informó que Davis parecía estar lejos de estar agobiado por el dolor.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El cuerpo de Leanne Tiernan, de 16 años, fue descubierto nueve meses después de su desaparición. Los científicos forenses encontraron pistas que pintaron un retrato virtual de su asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Atormentada por la desaparición de su madre, una joven emprendió su propia investigación.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2002, una pequeña comunidad en el norte del estado de Nueva York quedó devastada cuando Patty Wlasiuk murió en un accidente de camión.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un rastro de un asesinato se esfuma, hasta que la policía recibe un llamado de una mujer cuyo esposo, Gerald Powers, tenía un pasado criminal y una afición por los Chevy Berettas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Fue el accidente automovilístico más mortal en la historia de los Estados Unidos. Casi un centenar de vehículos participaron, doce personas murieron y más de cincuenta resultaron heridas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.desc: During Spirit Week at Degrassi, everyone has something to prove. Cam feels threatened by Zig, Dallas makes a flirty bet with Alli, and Eli's relationship with Clare is tested.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: David travels the world to unravel some of the wonders and puzzles of palaeontology. But how do you find the world's oldest and rarest reptile?

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: Could pterodactyls fly? And why did trilobites have such good eyes? David Attenborough investigates the secret lives of animals from the past, as told in the fossil record.

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: David Attenborough uncovers dinosaur bones in the Sahara desert and visits the biggest, most spectacular dinosaur displays in the world.

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: David Attenborough uncovers bizarre creatures of the earliest seas, tiny horses the size of spaniels and an animal that's half bird and half reptile - the rarest of them all.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs: Shortbites
programme.desc: Featured species are the coelophysis and the diplodocus.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs: Shortbites
programme.desc: Featured species are the opthalmosaurus and the ornithocheirus.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs: Shortbites
programme.desc: Featured species are the leaellynasaura and the tyrannosaurus.

programme.title: Archaeology: A Secret History
programme.desc: Archaeologist Richard Miles presents a series charting the history of the breakthroughs and watersheds in our long quest to understand our ancient past.

programme.title: Archaeology: A Secret History
programme.desc: Archaeologist Richard Miles shows how discoveries in the 18th and 19th centuries overturned ideas of when and where civilisation began, as empires competed to `own' the past.

programme.title: Archaeology: A Secret History
programme.desc: Richard Miles shows how 20th-century attention turned from civilisation and kings to the search for the common man against a background of science and competing political ideologies.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Special effects-filled documentary beginning 49 million years ago. The world is heavily forested and birds rule the planet, preying on small mammals. Whales have not yet evolved and their ancestors walk on the land.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: A pregnant basilosaurus, an 18-metre, carnivorous whale which lives in the Tethys Sea, is forced to kill the young of a smaller whale to ensure the survival of her unborn calf.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Going back 25 million years to the time of the indricothere, which was the largest mammal ever to live on dry land, being seven metres high and weighing 15 tons! The only threat to an adult would have been the hyaenadon which was the size of a rhino.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: The beginnings of mankind can be traced back 3.2 million years to Ethiopia and the advent of Australopithecus, a type of ape which, like humans, was bipedal. These early members of the human family faced many dangers, including the sabre-toothed cat.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Revealing the exotic, oversized creatures that inhabited South America one million years ago, such as the deadly smilodon, the largest of all sabre tooth cats.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Looking at the depths of the Ice Age, following a group of mammoths who have been forced to travel south with the advent of winter. On a dangerous journey across the Alps, many become trapped in bogs or fall victim to predators.

programme.title: Lost Cities of The Ancients
programme.desc: A journey to discover the legendary lost city of Piramesse, a magnificent ancient capital built 3,000 years ago by the Egyptian pharaoh Ramesses the Great.

programme.title: Lost Cities of The Ancients
programme.desc: In the Lambeyeque valley in northern Peru lies a strange lost world, the forgotten ruins of 250 mysterious pyramids, including some of the biggest on the planet, colossal structures made out of mud bricks.

programme.title: Lost Cities of The Ancients
programme.desc: It was one of the greatest vanishing acts in history. More than 3,000 years ago a mysterious and ruthless civilisation rose from nothing, created a brutal and unstoppable army and built an empire that rivalled Egypt and Babylon.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Curse of Peladon
programme.desc: Hepesh, supported by the delegate from Arcturus, is revealed to be behind the attacks. Arcturus is killed but Hepesh escapes to rouse a rebellion against the King.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Sea Devils
programme.desc: The Doctor and Jo visit the Master who is held prisoner on an island. There they learn that several ships have recently been sunk in the area and the Doctor decides to investigate.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Sea Devils
programme.desc: The Doctor is eager to make peace between the Sea Devils and the humans but has discovered that the Master is up to his old tricks.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Sea Devils
programme.desc: Jo attempts to rescue the Doctor who is being held prisoner by the Master and Trenchard. The Master plans to summon the Sea Devils from beneath the waves.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Sea Devils
programme.desc: The Doctor attempts to persuade Captain Hart of the danger that the Master represents. Eager to make contact with the Sea Devils, the Doctor journey's to the sea bed.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Sea Devils
programme.desc: The Doctor is captured by the Sea Devils and taken to their undersea base. There, he tries to make peace with the creatures, but his efforts are thwarted by the Navy.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Sea Devils
programme.desc: The Sea Devils come to the surface and attack the Naval base. The Doctor is forced to create a machine that will awaken the creatures across the entire world.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Mutants
programme.desc: The Doctor is sent to a skybase orbiting the planet of Solos in the 30th century, where he must deliver a sealed message pod. Meanwhile, on the planet below, something is transforming the human population into hideous mutants.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Mutants
programme.desc: Ky flees to the planet's poisonous surface taking Jo with him while the Marshal, holding the Doctor captive, demands that he opens the message pod.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Mutants
programme.desc: The Doctor searches for Jo in the caves of Solos. In the shadows the mutants prepare to attack.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Mutants
programme.desc: The Doctor and Sondergaard make an amazing discovery in the caves of Solos while Jo falls into the Marshal's trap.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Mutants
programme.desc: The Marshal's plans for Solos go disastrously wrong. Can the Doctor save the doomed planet in time to save Jo's life?

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Mutants
programme.desc: The Marshal is on trial, with the Doctor as chief witness. But Jo and the Doctor's friends are the Marshal's prisoners. Will the Doctor dare to reveal the truth about the Marshal's crimes?

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Time Monster
programme.desc: Masquerading as research scientist, Professor Thascales, the Master is using a device called TOMTIT to summon an ancient and powerful creature from beyond time.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Time Monster
programme.desc: The Doctor tracks the Master down to the Newton Institute. There, after a disastrous attempt to summon Kronos, the Master prepares to use TOMTIT once again.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Time Monster
programme.desc: Krasis, High Priest of Atlantis has been summoned by the Master to help him find the crystal of Kronos. The Master uses TOMTIT to summon threats from the past to attack UNIT.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Time Monster
programme.desc: As UNIT approaches, the Master leaves for Atlantis in his TARDIS. However, the Doctor is not far behind and in the time vortex, the two Time Lords confront each other.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Time Monster
programme.desc: Arriving in Atlantis, the Master seduces the beautiful Queen Galleia so that he might possess the crystal of Kronos. But it is protected by a guardian who is half man, half beast.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Time Monster
programme.desc: With the crystal of Kronos in his possession, the Master prepares to release the Chronovore. The Doctor is powerless to stop his nemesis as the end of Atlantis approaches.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Three Doctors
programme.desc: Attacked by an antimatter creature the Doctor sends an SOS to the Time Lords.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Three Doctors
programme.desc: The Doctor and Jo pass through the black hole to the desolate world of antimatter.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Three Doctors
programme.desc: The Doctors are trapped in the universe of antimatter where they confront Omega.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Three Doctors
programme.desc: Omega intends to escape his antimatter world but needs the Doctors to take his place.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Carnival of Monsters
programme.desc: The Doctor is free to roam space and time again, but having planned to visit Metebelis Three, the Doctor and Jo actually find themselves stowaways aboard a ship in the 1920s, heading for Bombay.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Carnival of Monsters
programme.desc: The Doctor and Jo realise that they are actually trapped in a loop on a miniaturised version of Earth in which the other ship passengers endlessly repeat their actions.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Carnival of Monsters
programme.desc: Having escaped from the ship, the Doctor and Jo find themselves stuck inside the workings of a giant machine. Can they find their way out?

programme.title: Doctor Who: Carnival of Monsters
programme.desc: The Doctor is reunited with the TARDIS and now full size, but Jo is still trapped within the machine. When the Doctor meets the operators of the Scope he learms that Jo is in grave danger.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar teams up with horse whisperer Pat Parelli to improve the behavior of the dogs and horses at a riding center; a schnauzer/poodle mix with separation anxiety and dog aggression.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Old and new cases that show the process for adopting a dog, introducing one to the home, setting rules and boundaries and dealing with the loss of a pet.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer

programme.title: Dog Whisperer

programme.title: Dog Whisperer

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Puppy mills produce millions of dogs; Ceaser works with an animal rights group to rescue and rehabilitate some pups.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar Millan helps Suzie Dove Miles, who has recently adopted a Doberman who is fearful of literally everything.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Family dogs brawl with each other; a dog torments a child; a five-legged miniature pinscher has an aggressive attitude.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar attempts to introduce Roscoe, an agoraphobic Akita who is too scared to leave the house and garden and has never been for a walk, to the outside world.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A Weimaraner eats everything in sight; a yellow Lab's excess energy is expressed destructively; an Australian shepherd is unable to socialize with other dogs.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Three canines with issues at a dog-friendly ad agency office; a border collie mix becomes excited and unresponsive to commands when in her owner's truck.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Velvet Revolver drummer Matt Sorum's French bulldog goes crazy at the sight of other dogs; Cesar helps a former therapy dog with aggression issues.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar teams up with horse whisperer Pat Parelli to improve the behavior of the dogs and horses at a riding center; a schnauzer/poodle mix with separation anxiety and dog aggression.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Old and new cases that show the process for adopting a dog, introducing one to the home, setting rules and boundaries and dealing with the loss of a pet.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Cecily has graduated from High School, and Dog believes the time is right to show her what the family business is all about. The rough and tumble world of bounty hunting is very different from the all-girls private school she attended.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: This one is close to home. Dog's target on today's hunt is the cousin of Kali, Garry Boy's caregiver. In addition, she has a reputation as a brawler. With Duane Lee still missing from the team, Baby Lyssa decides she will step up in this hunt.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: In an attempt to bring the team back together, Dog recruits his pastor, Tim Storey, to be the peacemaker. As Dog begins his hunt for a young man who has trouble showing up at court, Tim has his own mission--convince Duane Lee to meet with him.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: With Duane Lee back on the team, the rift in the Chapman clan appears over. But will time heal this wound? As the family heads out for the seedier side of Honolulu in search of an erotic dancer, we will find out if the wound is truly healed.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When can a bounty hunt also be a date? When Dog and Beth decide to ride in the same SUV as they pursue a runaway fugitive, will their different approaches to the investigation lead to a capture and romance?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When an alleged abuser goes on, the lame Dog gathers the team to bring him in. As the leads grow colder, Dog's determination only grows stronger. Finally, a hot lead comes in and Dog sets the trap for his prey.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and company head to the Big Island in pursuit of two courthouse no-shows, only to find that one of them appears to be posting status updates from Southern California.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The cameras are turned around, as we get a tour of life "behind the scenes" on Dog the Bounty Hunter. Using interviews with Dog and the posse, the TV crew, and never before seen footage, this is one of most revealing and heartfelt episodes of the series.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: This fugitive spells trouble for Dog in today's hunt. When the leads grow cold, it's the US Postal Service to the rescue as a mail carrier lends a helping hand. Dog's team surrounds the suspected safe house and silently awaits their prey.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today's case involves a Samoan, so Dog knows that the runner's close-knit kinfolk holds the keys to bringing him in. Dog's plan is to convince the family that everyone is best served if the fugitive mans up and takes care of business.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's target for today was once an upstanding member of his community. Now with no home, no job, and the law on his trail, this middle-aged exile from middle-class society is using the cold end of an ice pipe to soothe his troubled soul.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: New series focusing on the tumultuous home and professional life of bounty hunter Dwayne "Dog" Chapman, and his partner and wife Beth. In the first episode, Dog and team chase Floyd Chapman (no relation), a heavily tattooed bail jumper.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: In Hawaii, Dog sets off from Honolulu to Kona to help his son Leland with some of his fugitives. First, a stop at Leland's boxing gym to warm up for their day of hunting with a quick sparring session and some father-and-son time together.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog decides to liven things up with a competition. He and Beth will hunt for one fugitive, while Leland and Justin chase another. The winner will be the duo that captures its fugitive first. Will Dog keep bragging rights as the Best Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Once a criminal himself, Dog knows how it feels to be hunted. In this episode, Dog and the team delve into the depths of Honolulu's Chinatown as they search for a young Samoan girl who's gone down the wrong path. After a frustrating day of hunting, D

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: While hunting an elusive deep sea fisherman, Dog is also trying to plan a great Mother's Day for Beth, but he's having problems finding the special flowers Beth wants.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is hunting a man known as The Godfather of Waikiki. Dog and Beth bailed him out as a courtesy, but now he is refusing to go to court. If Dog doesn't bring him in, it could cost him more than money; he may lose his respect on the street.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog has a big problem. Patty Estabilio has jumped a $15,000 bail bond and disappeared into Hawaii's underworld. Kissing the kids good night, Dog and Beth, with Tim and Leland at their side, plunge into a drug-infused netherworld.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Justin is the low man on the totem pole in the Chapman clan, and this means that the rest of the team is always teasing him. But Justin wants to be a full-fledged member of the team, and Dog has a fugitive that will be his test case.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and his team return to their roots, with a visit to their home town of Denver. Dog and Tim begin the day with an early morning radio show appearance, and it pays off when a listener calls in with a tip about one of the fugitives they're hunting.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Back in Denver Dog discovers that recapturing the past can be more difficult then tracking down felons. On a day of more misses then hits in their fugitive hunting, Dog and Beth repeatedly collide with reminders of their early days.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog hunts down Chris, a fugitive wanted on drug charges. Dog turns over every rock, but to no avail. Later, they decides to revoke the bonds they holds on Chris's mother and stepfather because they've violated the conditions of their own bonds.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog goes after Virginia, a hard-to-find lawbreaker. He gets a tip that a pickup truck will be going to Virginia's house. In true private-eye fashion, the team tails the truck in two SUVs, regularly switching the follow car to throw off their scent.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog decides to sweep the island clean of as many fugitives as he can in two days. Raymond, wanted on drug charges, is an easy grab. Mauro, wanted for solicitation, is busted. And a Samoan, Siamau, is convinced to fly back to Hawaii from L.A.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog goes after a fugitive named Tracy who lives in a homeless shelter, but the shelter's staff is uncooperative, and the two sides get into an angry confrontation that forces Dog to temporarily back off.

programme.title: To The Rescue
programme.desc: Tommy reveals the amazing transformations of dog rescue! From star treatment for neglected Pomeranians to a dachshund's weight loss journey, these dogs show the power of rescue.

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: Julian rushes over to see worried and confused farmer Joe Holmes. He found one of his cows with afterbirth hanging out, so he thought she'd already calved. But there's no sign of a new arrival, so he suspects she's struggling to give birth.

programme.title: Walks With My Dog
programme.desc: Presenter Phil Spencer is in a truly majestic location as he takes his cocker spaniels for a walk in Windsor Great Park.

programme.title: Funniest Pets & People
programme.desc: Dog eating wedding cake; 80 years, 80 candles; Grandpa drops cake on lap.

programme.title: To The Rescue
programme.desc: Tommy follows rescue dogs taking the long way to their perfect homes. From Fitzgerald's heart surgery to Jodie's family reunion, these journeys end in love and safety.

programme.title: Lost And Found
programme.desc: Following the work of Dogs Trust, one of Britain's best-loved dog rescue charities, as they find new homes for unwanted and abandoned dogs.

programme.title: Dog School
programme.desc: In Warrington, we meet Henry the Labrador, one of day care’s livelier dogs. The staff has to restrict his play because he is a little overweight and too much exercise is bad for his joints.

programme.title: Pet Heroes
programme.desc: An ornery mare has a soft spot for a hurt and scared young horse; an injured dog struggles to care for her young pups during a harsh prairie winter.

programme.title: Dogs with Jobs

programme.title: Funniest Pets & People
programme.desc: Duck chases young boy around yard and takes him down; cow has an itch: finds a way to get a good scratch; cowboy lassos horse that just stands there and doesn't run.

programme.title: Funniest Pets & People
programme.desc: Dog pushes ball through obstacle course; skunk plays with ball; Hamster races; dog on treadmill.

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: A sheep is rushed into the practice to see Peter, after seriously injuring herself on a piece of metal. Peter thinks he can deal with the wound, but the bigger problem is that the ewe is pregnant with twins. And the lambs' lives are in danger.

programme.title: The Dog Rescuers
programme.desc: In South London, Inspector Kate Fletcher enlists the help of the police to investigate a teenager who has allegedly shot his dog with a BB-gun for entertainment.

programme.title: 2019 AKC National All-Breed Puppy and Junior Stakes
programme.desc: Watch America's only All-Breed Puppy Show, from the National Championships in Orlando, Florida.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Upon learning he is not her true father, Fallon refuses to see Blake; Jeff falls in love with Claudia, who is caught stealing from Denver-Carrington; Fallon's baby undergoes emergency surgery; Claudia's husband and daughter are believed dead.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: A blood test proves that Blake is Fallon's true father; Steven travels to Hollywood in search of his wife; Claudia learns her husband and daughter are believed to be dead; as Krystle struggles with an armed Claudia, the gun discharges.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Claudia is hospitalized after the shooting incident; Krystle is implicated. Logan Rhinewood continues to amass Devner-Carrington; Cecil proposes marriage to Alexis.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Claudia remains confused following the accident; Jeff urges Fallon to reconcile; Steven is blackmailed by a young drifter.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Steven is arrested; Alexis and Cecil plan to marry; Fallon tells Nick it's over between them; Claudia believes Fallon's baby is her now-deceased daughter Lindsay.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Middle Eastern oilman Farouk, anxious for vengeance against Blake, tells Nick that Carrington is responsible for the death of his brother. Nick attacks Blake, who is left unconscious at the bottom of a deep ravine.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystle finds Blake in the mountains and gets him to the hospital. Nick Toscanni disappears. Cecil is also brought to the hospital, and he's very weak. A police investigation is started to find the baby.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Michael goes to Denver to find out who he is. Alexis and Cecil plan a wedding in the hospital. Claudia disappears and Blake suspects her of kidnapping the baby. There's an exciting drama on the roof of a tall building.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: The baby is recovered from the real kidnapper, Alfred Grimes, and it turns out he's the father of Roger Grimes. Fallon fires Susan. Claudia leaves for a sanitarium. Fallon starts looking for a job. Blake gives her his hotel La Mirada.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Cecil leaves his estate and Colbyco to Jeff and Alexis. He also reveals his "Rhinewood" game to Blake at the reading of his will. Blake suspects Alexis of being a part of it.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis gives her newfound long-lost son Adam a job at Colbyco. Blake starts to believe that Adam may actually be his real son. Fallon and Adam keep flirting with each other, not knowing they are siblings. Adam has dinner with Krystle and Blake.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake tries to be friends with Adam, but Adam rejects him. Alexis tells Mark that he's still married to Krystle. Mark seeks to get a job as a tennis pro at Fallon's hotel.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Joseph's daughter, Kirby comes to stay with the Carringtons after breaking up with her fiance in France. Joseph tries to persuade her to go back to him. Mark gets the job at Fallon's hotel. Blake tries to get help from Congressman Neal McVane.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Fallon gets a letter from Steven and it turns out he's on an oil rig in the Java Sea, Indonesia. Adam mixes the toxic compound in the paint for Jeff's new office. Fallon hires Kirby as a nanny for little Blake.
