programme.title: EXTRAORDINARY HUMANS
programme.desc: Thom meets Rubik's cube champion Gabriel Dechichi, capable of solving a cube in under 10 seconds. Thom meets musical genius, Derek Paravacini, born blind, and with a severe form of autism.

programme.title: Nigel Marven's Cruise Ship Adventures
programme.desc: In Audubon Park, Nigel marvels at the Three-toed Amphiuma and encounters the mighty alligator snapping turtle. Heading full speed ahead to Central America, he ventures into Corcovado National Park in search of the endangered jaguar.

programme.title: Search for the Ghost Bears
programme.desc: Our film journey begins in Alaska's west. We are hoping to find glacier bears in the glacial regions of the Katmai National Park on the Douglas River.

programme.title: Whale Adventure With Nigel Marven
programme.desc: The whales are now on the home straight, and Nigel travels to the Bering Sea in the far west of Alaska to try to see them as they pass.

programme.title: Wonders Of...: Latvia - Riga
programme.desc: Ashley falls in love with the charm of Latvia’s capital city, Riga. The Soviet times left an abandoned history in Karosta and Ashley experiences the times as a prisoner and escapes to the sea like many.

programme.title: The Cheetah Diaries
programme.desc: This time on the Cheetah Diaries, how will Yell manage without his two front teeth? Zaza falls seriously ill. Founder Annie visits Anatolian guard dog Chobe to see if he is doing his job.

programme.title: EXTRAORDINARY HUMANS
programme.desc: Thom's quest takes him to London, to investigate a woman with the loudest shout on earth. Annalisa Flanagan who holds the world record.

programme.title: Peace Parks
programme.desc: In this series we follow the trail of the Transfrontier Parks bordering on South Africa and extending into neighbouring countries. We explore why these conservation areas are important and what they protect.

programme.title: Disruptive Nature
programme.desc: 2000 Mozambique Flood. Heavy rain through February and March 2000 led to massive flooding in Mozambique.

programme.title: Across The World With Te Radar
programme.desc: Deploying his own tracking device, Te Radar tries to find out what happens to rubbish that washes into waterways and finds himself shocked by how much plastic floats across the world’s oceans only to soil pristine beaches in the South Pacific.

programme.title: Wild Warrior Encounters
programme.desc: Episode 5

programme.title: The Cheetah Diaries
programme.desc: This time on the Cheetah Diaries, Emily takes the cubs on their first trip away from the cubhouse, a walk in the vineyards. She is eager to find out how if all her training has paid off and if the cubs are able to cope in an unfamiliar situation.

programme.title: A New Prehistory
programme.desc: Where do insects come from?

programme.title: Kalahari Meerkats: Episode 3
programme.desc: The Gosa Gang have recently moved to a new home known as Fortress burrow. It is close to the Gosa Dam where a rival family of meerkats live. In the quest for territorial dominance there has been a major meerkat standoff.

programme.title: Kanga Pan: An African Horror Story
programme.desc: Kanga Pan – An African Horror Story is a spine-chilling, one-off wildlife documentary, the first of its kind. A relatively unknown inland waterhole in Mana Pools National Park, Kanga Pan is a gathering point for a melting pot of wildlife species.

programme.title: Destination Wild: Wild Islands
programme.desc: The Caribbean is famous for being a tropical paradise…but it also has a wild and unfamiliar side. Forged by volcanoes and shaped by hurricanes, the islands are unique and the wildlife that inhabits them is as surprising, as it is spectacular.

programme.title: Step Up: High Water
programme.desc: Janelle and Dondre can't seem to hide their true feelings; alliances at High Water are challenged.

programme.title: Step Up: High Water
programme.desc: Sage's troubles start trending; Dondre discovers that Janelle has been keeping a secret from him.

programme.title: Step Up: High Water
programme.desc: Odalie finds out why Davis has been skipping class; King's loyalties are torn; Tal finally makes a move on his crush.

programme.title: Greenleaf
programme.desc: Lady Mae wants to preach at women's day but Deacon Sykes is not convinced; Basie wants Jacob to run a new community center that will be built near Calvary; Lady Mae confronts Mavis.

programme.title: Greenleaf
programme.desc: The Greenleaf family struggles in the aftermath of Mac's release; Lady Mae makes a last-ditch attempt to save the Bishop; Basie's announcement opens a rift between the Bishop and Jacob.

programme.title: Greenleaf
programme.desc: Grace and Charity oppose Lady Mae's reaction to demands from the Deacon Board; the Bishop visits his father-in-law and runs into Mac; Kerissa and Jacob prepare to move out; Grace goes out with Darius Nash, a journalist following Calvary.

programme.title: Greenleaf
programme.desc: After one of Mac's victims attempts suicide, Grace makes a rash move that may have lasting consequences; Kevin's mother visits, exposing old wounds; Lady Mae tries to make Jacob see reason.

programme.title: Greenleaf
programme.desc: Bishop and Lady Mae preside over Calvary's Fall Revival, and decide to take action against Basie; Both Lady Mae and Grace connect with old friends; Grace confronts Mac's new girlfriend.

programme.title: Greenleaf
programme.desc: When Basie hears about the injunction filed to stop construction of Triumph Two, he stages a sit-in at Calvary in an attempt to force Bishop's hand; Grace's plan to put Mac away hits a snag.

programme.title: Power
programme.desc: After his spiritual awakening with Rev. Macedon, Ghost confesses his sins to Angela; Angela preps Tasha for federal questioning; Ghost must break his business deal with Tommy when Truth is audited by the IRS.

programme.title: Power
programme.desc: Ghost, Tommy and Kanan move forward with their task to kill the heads of the Jimenez Cartel; Donovan warns Angela that her own office is after her; LaKeisha lets slip that Teresi is Tommy's father.

programme.title: Power
programme.desc: The AUSA turns up the heat on Ghost and implicates his inner circle in on a RICO; Ghost and Tommy plan to frame Dre for the murder of Raymond Jones, Raina's killer; Angela and Tasha enact a plan of their own.

programme.title: Power
programme.desc: When Angela's arrest of Jimenez gives her a solid win, she discovers plans that would undercut her career; Ghost tasks Tommy in killing a snitch, changing all of their lives; Tariq accepts the consequences of his choices.

programme.title: Power
programme.desc: When the RICO case comes crashing down, Angela breaks ranks to form her own A-team; LaKeisha takes a stand of her own while Ghost, Tommy, Tasha, and Angela race against the clock to prove their innocence.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will be standing on opposite platforms suspended in the air. Contestants will be locked in a cage and hung from a crane. Contestant will have to siphon fluid out of containers and into a funnel. A contestant will cross a beam above ground.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Poles will be attached and hung off the dump truck off the ground. Plexiglas box is buried in the sand and filled with water and sand. Contestants will be standing on a car that is suspended over the water by a crane.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will be standing on top of a platform that covers a water tank. A blindfolded contestant is guided by their partner's verbal commands to a tank filled with leeches. Contestants will be standing a tube that is suspended in the air from a crane.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant will be standing on the platform that is suspended. Contestants will lick bugs off of ropes. A glass tube is suspended vertically from a crane with the top sealed and the bottom open and submerges in a pool.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant will be in a dingy that is being towed by a net attached to the back end of the schooner. Contestants will be standing on a plank above the water. Contestants have Thanksgiving dinner. Contestant will start on a platform above the water.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will be bound to a chair, that will be suspend over the water. Dressed in a dog bite protection suit, contestants must climb out of a specially designed chimney and into an enclosed room. Contestant must drive their car towards a pipe ramp.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants are standing on top of one of two semi trucks traveling. Contestants will play a game to determine how many disgusting donuts they will have to eat. Contestants will be standing on a truss structure that is above the water.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: In this head to head couples stunt the male contestants will be hung by their ankles under individual helicopters. Each team will be in their own massive trough filled with fish guts, squid, and fish scales.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: In this couples stunt the contestants will be standing at a podium on the roof of a 5 story building. The first contestant loads a piece of cow stomach onto a catapult, which will launch the stomach down range to their partner

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: In this head to head couples stunt, each team is seated in the front of their own car. Male contestants head is placed through a hole cut into the bottom of a slightly angled plexi-sewer pipe, his arms are shackled around the outside of the pipe.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: In this stunt one of the contestants will be seated on a platform above the water wearing weighted boots. Laying face down on the floor, contestants' heads are placed in separate medieval looking helmets, filled with snakes and rats.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will each be standing on the back of a flatbed truck driving down the edge of a pier. Contestant must guide their blindfolded partner through a maze of electrical tripwires.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: In this couples stunt, each contestant will be standing on a beam that is suspended in the air off the sides of a train box car. In a banquet room, couples will feed each other as much disgusting food as they can.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Both contestants in the finals will be riding on the back of an Ultraboat as a helicopter settles in overhead. Male contestant is placed in a bamboo cage filled with large bullfrogs, which is then lowered into a pit.

programme.desc: Action superstar Jean-Claude van Damme ("Bloodsport", "Cyborg") is a veteran undercover cop posing as an inmate in a dangerously corrupt state prison.

programme.title: Double Impact
programme.desc: Identical twins are separated at six months and raised on different continents. They reunite twenty-five years later to avenge the murder of their parents and reclaim their stolen family fortune.

programme.title: Timecop

programme.desc: Action superstar Jean-Claude Van Damme joins forces with NBA and media sensation Dennis Rodman in this action-packed thriller. Top counter-terrorist Jack Quinn is ready to get out of the spy game until the evil Stavros kidnaps his wife and unborn son.

programme.title: Knock Off
programme.desc: Jean-Claude Van Damme plays a fashion designer who must join forces with a C.I.A. agent to combat terrorism.

programme.title: Legionnaire
programme.desc: Alain is a boxer in 1925 Marseille, France. When he doesn't take the dive paid to take by a mob boss, he has to split. He joins the Foreign Legion and is sent to Morocco. He makes 3 friends and they watch each other's backs.

programme.title: Todo un chef
programme.desc: La cocina es el corazón de cada hogar y queremos que lo pongas a latir con las mejores recetas, que compartas en familia y te luzcas como #TodoUnChef.

programme.title: Todo un chef
programme.desc: La cocina es el corazón de cada hogar y queremos que lo pongas a latir con las mejores recetas, que compartas en familia y te luzcas como #TodoUnChef.

programme.title: A bocados: Episodio 1
programme.desc: Receta 1: chipirones encebollados 'Pelayo'. Limpieza de chipirones (Ana, pescatera). Pesca de chipirones (Antonio y Luis, jubilados). Receta 2: tortilla de patatas light (con patata cocida en el microondas).

programme.title: A bocados: Episodio 2
programme.desc: Receta 1: carrillera guisada con salsa de queso roncal. Jose Manuel, de la carnicería Olano, enseña como se limpian las carrilleras. La Manducátela, tienda especializada en la venta de queso, propiedad de Maria Mora.

programme.title: A bocados: Episodio 3
programme.desc: Receta: bonito, tomate y guindillas de Ibarra. Plantación de tomates de Juan Antonio, en Getaria. Descarga de bonito en Bermeo y sistema de subasta.

programme.title: A bocados: Episodio 4
programme.desc: Receta: croquetas de morcilla con manzana y piñones. Elaboración de morcillas en el obrador de la carnicería Olano de Beasain (Isabel Imaz, Jose Luis y Loinaz).

programme.title: Cocina latina: Recetas de Maíz Venezolano
programme.desc: El venezolano Juan Pablo González muestra la versatilidad del maíz y prepara platos dulces y salados con este ingrediente tradicional.

programme.title: Cocina latina: El Pan Nacional de Venezuela
programme.desc: El cocinero apasionado Juan Pablo González nos presenta la arepa, una especialidad venezolana, y muestra cuatro rellenos diferentes y deliciosos.

programme.title: El pescado en el plátillo
programme.desc: El enérgico chef y experto en mariscos Spencer Watts muestra cómo las cortezas y los revestimientos agregan una textura tentadora al rico atún y a las ostras frescas y picantes.

programme.title: El pescado en el plátillo
programme.desc: ¿A quién no le gusta una sorpresa? El chef Spencer Watts, amante de los mariscos, hace de la perca y el cangrejo la estrella oculta en tamales, albóndigas, rollitos primavera y picaduras de jalapeños.

programme.title: El pescado en el plátillo
programme.desc: En el menú, son tendencia los langostinos relucientes y fríos que se derrite en la boca, ya que el chef y experto en mariscos Spencer Watts se pone un poco salado con los platos del mar.

programme.title: El pescado en el plátillo
programme.desc: El chef Spencer Watts muestra cómo la explosión de acidez del limón, la lima, la naranja y la toronja agregan un sabor tentador al suave pez dorado y a las vieiras dulces.

programme.title: Veracruz Casual
programme.desc: En medio de un viaje, la camioneta de Mónica Muñiz se descompone, quedando varada en algún punto de México. Al saber que su arreglo tomará varios días, decide recorrer los alrededores y llega a Tlacotalpan.

programme.title: Veracruz Casual
programme.desc: Luego de afirmar que el quedarse varada es una buena idea, Mónica Muñiz toma el transporte público para llegar a Catemaco, cuna de los brujos y tegogolos, y donde descubrirá la cultura de este pueblo mágico.

programme.title: Agenda Privada
programme.desc: Charlie es una figura reconocida que ha decidido viajar de manera exclusiva y lujosa a distintos sitios de México y el mundo, con el fin de conocer los mejores detalles de cada lugar.

programme.title: Agenda Privada
programme.desc: Charlie quiere conocer más sobre el estilo de vida de la gente de la isla, por lo que se aventura a participar en un juego de bingo muy peculiar.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay visita el Pabellón Español en Nueva Jersey. Descubre que un par de hermanos en disputa están llevando el restaurante al suelo. Contiene lenguaje para adultos.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay llega a un restaurante endeudado propiedad de dos ex meseras y las cosas están tan mal que Ramsay realiza una intervención para abordar el tema del liderazgo.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: PJ's Steakhouse se está muriendo por la falta de control de la gerencia en la calidad de la comida, con un dueño un poco grosero y su esposo, el copropietario, sentados en el bar bebiendo todo el día.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay hace el viaje a Carlstadt, Nueva Jersey, para visitar Grasshopper Also, un restaurante que ha visto días mejores. Contiene lenguaje para adultos.

programme.title: Familias frente al fuego
programme.desc: La competición arranca con dos equipos de cuatro familias cada uno, ocho en total. Ambos equipos tienen el mismo reto: cocinar un menú que represente su tradición y Cultura.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The victim had ingested a massive amount of cyanide. An unlikely clue — a flaw on a mailing envelope — exposed a murderer who was willing to kill innocent people.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: They thought the fire would cover their crime. But one tiny clue, no bigger than a thumbtack, remained. It held all the information investigators needed to put a trio of cold-blooded killers behind bars.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1994, 19-year-old Shannon Melendi disappeared while at Emory University. Her disappearance remained a mystery for ten years, until new scientific testing cast a different light on Colvin "Butch" Hinton.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1987, the death of Crystal Purcell was considered an accident. Then in 2001, Barbara Purcell called police to suggest that her estranged husband had killed Crystal.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Paul Gruber's daughter suspected something was wrong when she received birthday cards addressed from her father, but written in a stranger's handwriting.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The woman was dead. The man had been shot four times and survived. When the man's version of events contradicted physical evidence, investigators turned to forensic science to paint a clearer picture of the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: How did the stalker obtain the security system code for his victim's home? How did he steal her personal photographs? Police needed answers and they found them in the most unlikely of places.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After inspecting storm damage to a home in Tampa, an insurance assessor simply disappeared. Thirty hours later, her body was found in a nearby river. But the killer had been careless.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a hit-and-run accident claimed the life of a high school athlete, everyone in town mourned his passing. Finding the killer was a long shot at best.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A murder trail turned cold, until police got a call from a woman whose husband, Gerald Powers, had a criminal past and a fondness for Chevy Berettas.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1991, Grand Junction, Colorado is on edge after a series of deadly bombings kill two people and injure one more. Police race to find the culprit before he strikes again.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Lives changed in the 20 years following an unsolved murder, and so did forensic science. In time, a high-powered microscope and DNA profiling revealed a clue no one had seen before.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A lifelong resident of the tiny town of Lefroy, Tasmania was murdered outside his own home. Robbery appeared to be the motive, but with no suspects, the investigation came to a halt.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a wealthy socialite died after falling down the stairs, witness accounts contradicted evidence. To find out what really happened, investigators employed a physicist and an expert in accident reconstruction.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1997, Kelly Eckart's car was found, with her belongings still in it, after she worked a late shift in Franklin, Indiana. Days later, her body was found in an isolated ravine.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1996, Derrick Duehren returned to find his Oregon home burned to the ground. His wife's charred remains were later found in the rubble. Investigators set out to determine if it was an unfortunate accident or murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.desc: Un extraño bebé aparece en la puerta de LFDB, quien viene acarreando una ola de destrucción. Ahora la salvación del mundo depende de la Familia del Barrio.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin manages to steal the Dracula Heart Ruby from a mysterious woman known as Mother. The Dracula Heart Ruby is known to bleed once every century and whoever drinks its blood maintains their youth for another 100 years.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin steals a painting of Lupin I's beloved from Baltan Gallery in Paris. However, the painting turns out to be a forgery and Lupin has a clue as to who is painting the forgeries. With his daughter Sophie held hostage.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and Fujiko attend a lavish party full of wealthy women in order to steal their jewelry. However, the castle tower where the party was being held turns out to be a rocket ship. The hijacked rocket transports the party and guests to a small island.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Mrs. Alda, a wealthy heiress is kidnapped and Lupin shows up to claim the ransom money. However, the real mastermind behind the kidnapping is Mrs. Alda herself. After she gets the ransom money, she erases Lupin's memory and frames him for the crime.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin learns he needs a pure-hearted girl to find an ancient Persian treasure and his computer chooses a girl named Lori. After getting some hands-on training from Jigen and Goemon, the two are headed to Jordan to find the treasure.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: The Golden Apple, known as "Eve's Apple" is being transported to New York City on board a luxury cruise ship and Inspector Zenigata has a gut feeling Lupin is after it. Inspector Zenigata's hunch is on the mark as Lupin and Jigen are onboard the ship.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin is over the moon when Fujiko promises to marry him if he steals the ICPO's gold for her. Lupin pulls off the heist right under Inspector Zenigata's nose, but the two soon find themselves locked up in jail.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: It's the Mafia Boss' birthday party and everyone is gambling away. Lupin's next target is the casino's safe. While attending the party, Lupin meets a girl named Jenny, who is willing to help him pull off the heist to sell her name.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin breaks out a man named Parker from a Mexican prison in order to steal the treasure Parker had hidden away somewhere.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin, who was once duped by Mamushidayu into stealing diamonds, decides its payback time. Will Lupin get his revenge and finally get his share of diamonds after all?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: An ancient burial mound has been discovered and etched on its walls are ancient mythical creatures with jewel-encrusted eyes. Lupin makes off with the blue dragon's crystal eye and kidnaps the archeologist in charge.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang break into a vault full of uncut diamonds. However, the diamonds suddenly catch on fire, and guess who is being blamed for it!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: The Swiss Bank's Beirut branch is a mobile branch. Will Lupin manage to pull off the heist of this impenetrable bank and get out safely with Inspector Zenigata on his tail?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang are after Taniyama's treasure from an ancient Chinese dynasty. Realizing that Lupin is after his treasure, Taniyama hires a lone assassin named Seiryuu to counter Goemon.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: How could Lupin and his gang refuse when a church priest asks them to retrieve the Dove's Eggs, the church's jewels, for the sake of Spoonland's children?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang are in New York City to steal a pinball machine made of solid gold. Lupin, Jigen, and Fujiko board a casino cruise ship and discover that they'll need Goemon's Zantetsuken sword to pull off the heist.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang were pursuing Flight 107 when Soviet Union planes suddenly shoot it down for wandering into its territory inadvertently.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: A ring called the Star of Alaska holds a single wheat seed inside it. The seed is a new species of wheat that can grow in minus 40 degrees and the CIA and KGB are determined to get their hands on it.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin is over the moon, now that he's won Fujiko's hand in marriage after stealing Marie Antoinette's wedding dress and ring.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: A massive amount of gold is being transported in the cover of darkness, but on this rainy night, Lupin is busy being a bartender to a beautiful woman named Sara.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang steal an exquisite painting of a young girl from a Renoir art exhibit. Using the painting as bait, Lupin and his gang plan to steal Ghellon's impressive art collection.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: John Decker, an oil tycoon from Colorado hires Lupin to steal the US presidential limousine and promises to pay 10 million dollars in return.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang were scoping out their next target, Macintosh Jewelry, the world's most expensive jewelry store when they end up inadvertently saving a young boy who was being kidnapped.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang make off with the New York Mafia's secret cash hoard. However, the suitcases were filled with old newspapers and as retribution, the mafia puts a hefty bounty on Lupin's head.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang blow up Fontaubert Bank's underground safe to steal 5 tons worth of gold, but someone has beaten them to it. The thieves are a pair of disguise artists named John and Mary.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang steal the Eagle of Helazard from a luxury cruise ship, but Fujiko betrays them at the last moment and makes off with the Eagle.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Inspector Zenigata is even more determined to capture Lupin after an incident with Anne. Lupin and his gang will soon learn that Inspector Zenigata is a force to be reckoned with when he's raging mad.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: In the Royal Palace, Viola, Luffy, and the Toy Soldier have hidden themselves outside Doflamingo's chamber, only to have more enemies approach from behind, leaving them surrounded! Meanwhile, Franky is knocked out cold by the Navy.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Toys all across Dressrosa regain their human form, a flood of forgotten memories return, and Kyros launches a long overdue attack on the villainous tyrant Doflamingo!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Kyros finally taking down Doflamingo leaves Doflamingo's clan shocked! Meanwhile at the Colosseum, Rebecca gets her memories of her loving father Kyros back, and Sabo makes a move to end the championship battle by blowing up the whole ring!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy hurries to free Law, but with their pirate alliance dissolved, will Law still see Luffy as an ally? Meanwhile, Usopp has convinced his newfound followers to destroy the factory! Doflamingo's defeat has thrown Dressrosa into chaos.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The mystery of Doflamingo's return from the dead is revealed! But there isn't much time to ponder how it happened, as his plan to silence the country of Dressrosa unfolds, spelling doom for the Straw Hats!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As the people of Dressrosa see their friends and loved ones slaughter each other under the manipulation of Doflamingo, memories of 10 years ago rush back, and the truth of that event becomes clear. Doflamingo announces the rules for his deadly game.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Doflamingo and Fujitora's agreement to not engage each other lasts for the moment - meaning all eyes are turned towards taking down the Straw Hats and claiming the rewards! And as Luffy starts heading to the Royal Palace, Fujitora stands in his way!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Robin, Usopp, the Tontattas and the others make moves to rejoin Luffy as Doflamingo's deadly game rages on! Meanwhile, Kin'emon makes it to the trash heap in his search for his friend Kanjuro - just as Pica emerges in the town.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: With Luffy & the others recovering from Pica's attack, the game is afoot! Luffy has just enough time to regroup and set out to find Doflamingo, only to find that the dastardly Warlord has more enemies than he might realize! A strange argument breaks out.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Don Chin Jao and Elizabello successfully break Pica's giant arm but the rock giant is unfazed and starts throwing even more destructive punches at Luffy and his band of unwanted collaborators! Meanwhile, Navy Admiral Fujitora moves into action.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and Moocy fast approach the showdown with Doflamingo - while the others with a beef against him continue to tag along. Meanwhile, Violet finds the key to Law's handcuffs, and Rebecca pledges to deliver it to him.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy makes headway toward Doflamingo's refuge, making his way through Doflamingo's guards, while down below Admiral Fujitora faces off against Sabo, who has the power of the Fire Fist from eating the Flare-Flare Fruit!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy cuts a lucky break as Kelly Funk shows him a shortcut to the Palace! But all may not be as it seems... Meanwhile, Franky and Zoro are locked in one-on-one duels, while Robin, Rebecca, and Bartolomeo enlist the help of the Tontattas.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Penned in at the bottom of a well, Luffy and Law are caught in a trap! But someone has come to save them who they least expect! Meanwhile, the Tontattas help Franky break in to the SMILE factory, and Bartolomeo resorts to tactics he used in the Colosseum.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Tontattas locate their captive comrades and seem to be able to get the message to them - the prison break is on! Meanwhile, heavy-hitters from the Colosseum turn from wringing each other's necks towards a unified plan.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Hidden far underground, Kin'emon finds his old friend Kanjuro whose powers allow the two to, quickly, but not elegantly, escape to the surface! Meanwhile, Cavendish shares his fears that the "Birdcage" game Doflamingo is playing has been rigged all along.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Tontattas are in full revolt! But can they keep their wits about them long enough to make it out? Meanwhile, Zoro finally gains the upper hand against Pica, and Franky finds a way to deal with Señor Pink.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Franky finally makes it into the factory and the Tontattas are reunited with their captive friends! But Princess Mansherry is nowhere to be found. Factory manager Kuween becomes irate when ignored and launches an attack on Franky.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Robin, Rebecca, and Bartolomeo draw closer to the Flower Field on the fourth level of the Royal Palace plateau, but a sudden attack by Gladius' exploding spheres sends Robin and Bartolomeo hurtling towards the level below.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Rebecca makes it to the Flower Field alone, but unfortunately finds company there that is less than friendly! Meanwhile, Bartolomeo pushes himself to the limit in order to help Luffy advance, but does he leave himself vulnerable in the process?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Diamante has Rebecca pinned and completely overpowered. If only the Soldier-san of her youth were able to protect her! Meanwhile, Luffy and Law finally surmount incredible odds to land themselves in striking distance of Doflamingo.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Usopp uses Viola's Clairvoyance to prepare his ammunition to take Sugar out! But the slightest hesitation now will spell disaster, and the end of Luffy! Luckily for the Straw Hats, Usopp's ammunition has been specially designed for this situation!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The final showdown with Doflamingo begins, but the Warlord still has several tricks up his sleeve - including turning one of Luffy's own friends against him! Meanwhile Franky and Señor Pink are in a standoff to find out who is the coolest.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: All hopes rest on Luffy and Law being able to take down Doflamingo; but the Warlord has other plans in mind as he gives the two the fight of their lives, and reveals his true, shocking history! Meanwhile, Sabo finds out Fujitora's true intention…

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: With Fujitora's stalemate arousing suspicion in the Navy ranks, Law and Luffy stand seconds away from execution at the hand of Doflamingo! But before he dispatches them both, he shares the secret of his sway over the Celestial Dragons!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The horrible secret of Flevance, the White Town, is revealed, giving clues to Law's traumatic past! A rage born from the lies of the World Government created a child who had the will to kill Corazon!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Law's attack on Corazon looks less successful than he thought! And after he's accepted into the Doflamingo Family, Corazon's mysterious silence hides a fact that may save Law's life - and a hidden danger Law must face in Doflamingo himself!

programme.desc: The world's best fighters are invited to DOA, a martial-arts tournament. Four female rival fighters, an aristocratic warrior, a wrestling superstar, an athlete with a tragic past, and an assassin-for-hire, work together to uncover a secret.

programme.title: Hoosiers
programme.desc: A man gets a last-chance job coaching a small-town Indiana high-school basketball team and faces the dual challenge of bringing this underdog team to the 1951 state championship and redeeming himself from a mysterious past.

programme.title: Air
programme.desc: From award-winning director Ben Affleck, Air reveals the game-changing partnership between a then undiscovered Michael Jordan and Nike’s fledgling basketball division which revolutionized the world of sports and culture with the Air Jordan brand.

programme.title: Suburbicon
programme.desc: From director George Clooney, Suburbicon is the perfect place for Gardner Lodge (Matt Damon) to raise a family. But the tranquil surface masks a disturbing reality, as Gardner must navigate the town's dark underbelly of betrayal, deceit, and violence.

programme.title: Junebug
programme.desc: Rising stars Amy Adams and Ben McKenzie light up the screen in this award-winning comedy about love, family, ambition, and the choices that come with each. When worldly art dealer Madeleine (Embeth Davidtz) meets her new Southern in-laws. Rated: R

programme.title: Hunt for the Wilderpeople
programme.desc: Ricky is a defiant young city kid who finds himself on the run with his cantankerous foster uncle in the wild New Zealand bush. A national manhunt ensues, and the two are forced to put aside their differences and work together.

programme.title: The Legend of Baron To'a
programme.desc: Fritz, a young Tongan man grappling with his wrestling superstar father Baron To'a's legacy, both metaphorically and literally following in his deceased father's footsteps by fighting for the return of his dad's stolen championship belt.

programme.title: The Dead Lands
programme.desc: A Maori chieftain's son seeks to avenge his father's murder and the slaughter of his tribe. Hongi must pass through the Dead Lands and forge an alliance with the mysterious "Warrior".

programme.title: Blood and Chocolate
programme.desc: The story takes place in modern day Bucharest and tells the tale of nineteen year old Vivian Gandillon, who has spent her life on the run from the truth that she is a werewolf.

programme.title: Push
programme.desc: Superhumans defy a government plot to harness and abuse their powers. Chris Evans and Dakota Fanning (the TWILIGHT films) team in a pulse-pounding paranormal thriller.

programme.title: Young Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: When a plague of bizarre, puzzling murders grip London, young Holmes and his new found friend Watson find themselves unwittingly entangled in the dark mystery.

programme.title: Bulletproof Monk
programme.desc: For many years a mysterious monk with no name (Chow Yun-Fat) has zigzagged the globe to protect an ancient scroll -- a scroll that holds the key to unlimited power. Now the Monk must look for a new scrollkeeper.

programme.title: Bill & Ted's Excellent Adventure
programme.desc: Our non-heinous heroes Bill (Alex Winter) and Ted (Keanu Reeves) are in danger of flunking history! But when the righteous Rufus (George Carlin) arrives in a time-traveling phone booth, the dense dudes discover their destiny!

programme.title: Bill & Ted's Bogus Journey
programme.desc: In this sequel to BILL & TED'S EXCELLENT ADVENTURE, the dimwitted duo travel to Heaven, Hell and points in between as they meet (among others) Albert Einstein, the Easter Bunny and the Grim Reaper.

programme.title: Bill & Ted Face the Music
programme.desc: Yet to fulfill their rock and roll destiny, the stakes are higher than ever for the now middle-aged Bill and Ted who set out on a new adventure when a visitor from the future warns them that only their song can save life as we know it.

programme.title: Project Fire: Raichlen's Rules: Steak

programme.title: Project Fire: Wine Country Grill

programme.title: World's Weirdest Restaurants

programme.title: World's Weirdest Restaurants

programme.title: World's Weirdest Restaurants

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Mekong River, Vietnam: On the river, Tony drinks a lot of Mekong moonshine with the welcoming owners of a duck farm. Although seduced by his Vietnam experience, Tony is not sure the royal dish Birds Nest Soup is all it's cracked up to be.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Cambodia: With a friend along for the ride, Tony travels to Phnom Penh, Cambodia, where he explores a food culture that is both pleasing to the palette and slightly frightening.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Cambodia and Japan: Taking his obsession with the film Apocalypse Now a little too seriously, Tony sets out for Pailin reputed to be one of the most dangerous towns on earth. After his journey, Tony returns to Japan.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour

programme.title: Crimes That Made History

programme.title: Crimes That Made History
programme.desc: In August 1933, Violette Nozière, 18, killed her father by poisoning in Paris. After a short period on the run, she was charged with murder and swiftly confessed to the crime, saying her motive was that he abused her.

programme.title: Crimes That Made History
programme.desc: On May 18th, 1936, Abe Sada killed her lover by “erotic asphyxia” then cut off his member and carved his name in her flesh. In a militarized Japan, the press was very interested in this crime with erotic and transgressive accents.

programme.title: Crimes That Made History

programme.title: Crimes That Made History

programme.title: Crimes That Made History
programme.desc: 1978 Guyana: Reverend Jim Jones holds an apocalyptic mass. Its outcome was the sacrifice of 918 members of the Peoples Temple – an American cult founded in the middle of the 1950s. The entire world was horrified by the journalists’ accounts.

programme.title: Crimes That Made History
programme.desc: On 31 August 1997, Princess Diana died alongside her companion, Dodi Al-Fayed, in a car crash in Paris, whilst being pursued by paparazzi. Her untimely death prompted an outpouring of grief in Britain and elsewhere in the world.

programme.title: Crimes That Made History

programme.title: The First 48

programme.title: I Shouldn't Be Alive

programme.desc: Doctors struggle to save a young man brought to the ER frozen and pulseless; a man gets deathly ill while attending his own anniversary party; an embarrassing hidden secret prohibits a heart attack patient from being rushed to the OR for surgery.

programme.desc: A mountain biker has multiple injuries and her boyfriend has multiple fainting spells; a man's legs are severed when he's run over by a train; a drunken bachelor helps reveal the secret of a mystery nurse that has been working in the ER.

programme.title: Secrets of War
programme.desc: The soldiers who use 'Psy Ops' use every means available to break the will of the enemy. This episode explores the techniques of wartime 'persuasion.'

programme.title: Secrets of War
programme.desc: Both sides of the war used secret submersibles of all shapes and sizes to conduct 'sneak craft' clandestine warfare.

programme.title: Secrets of War
programme.desc: Never tried for war crimes or even interrogated, Hirohito was an enigmatic figure from Pearl Harbor to his secret role in the surrender of Japan.

programme.title: Hitler's Propaganda Machine
programme.desc: Hitler’s fascination with propaganda was born in the trenches of the First World War. There he saw it emerge as a potent tool of psychological warfare - one that he would harness to build the Nazi movement. Witness Hitler's early propaganda tactics.

programme.title: Hitler's Propaganda Machine
programme.desc: This episode explores Hitler's approach to propaganda in power; where persuasion was achieved through propaganda and terror, all in service of one goal: the creation of a state under one shared ideology. A new German power fueled by propaganda.

programme.title: Hitler's Propaganda Machine
programme.desc: This episode explores the way Hitler used propaganda to justify his warmongering, reframing it as defense of Germany’s people and borders. It investigates the role propaganda played for both Hitler and the Allies to mobilize their countries for war.

programme.title: World War II: Total War
programme.desc: The Second World War was the closest the world has come to a complete total war.

programme.title: World War II: Total War
programme.desc: Total War demands resources: economic, agricultural and industrial. It draws upon the labour and the morale of entire populations to meet its needs.

programme.title: World War II: Total War
programme.desc: The Second World War shattered the boundaries between battlefield and home-front in much of the world.

programme.title: World War II: Total War
programme.desc: In the Second World War civilians became defenders against and targets of aerial warfare on a scale never before seen.

programme.title: World War II: Total War
programme.desc: Total War was not the cause of the Holocaust but it did provide a means for its execution. This episode will explore what role total war played in this genocide.

programme.desc: A hitman, his boss, an art dealer and a money-laundering scheme that accidentally turns the assassin into an overnight avant-garde sensation, one that forces her to play the art world against the underworld.

programme.title: The Gunman
programme.desc: Eight years after a successful assassination, a former mercenary finds himself the target of hit squads hired to ensure his silence.

programme.title: Smart Travels with Rudy Maxa
programme.desc: We get a Pacific Rim rush when we visit energetic, ever-changing Hong Kong. On a famous Star Ferry, Rudy savors one of the most majestic skylines on earth.

programme.title: Smart Travels with Rudy Maxa
programme.desc: From a dramatic, historic coast to rural pastures, this sweet section of France abounds with apple orchards, enchanting villages, stunning abbeys, and sparkling seaports. At Giverny, and in the museum in Rouen, we discover the birth of Impressionism.

programme.title: Smart Travels with Rudy Maxa
programme.desc: Hot-spiced cider and strains of "O Tannenbaum" warm our hearts as we head to Europe for Christmas. Switzerland has a special glow this time of year and we find plenty of good cheer in the bright Christmas markets and toasty ski lodges.

programme.title: Smart Travels with Rudy Maxa
programme.desc: We're blessed with a bit of Irish luck as we take on Ireland's beautiful west coast. We start in Galway, Europe's fastest growing city. Then it's a salt-sprayed boat trip to the fabled Aran Islands where we reach breathless heights at a Stone Age fort.

programme.title: Rick Steves' Europe
programme.desc: We'll start with a cruise through Venice's lagoon, pausing to savor fresh fish canal-side. Then we'll sample the treasures of the Accademia Gallery, explore some back-street wonders, and luxuriate in a venerable café on St. Mark's Square.

programme.title: Rick Steves' Europe: France's Loire: Chateau Country
programme.desc: In France's Loire Valley, we'll visit four unique castles — elegant Chenonceau, massive Chambord, stately Cheverny, and fragrant Villandry — with fun stops along the way.

programme.title: Rick Steves' Europe
programme.desc: In this first of three shows focusing on European travel skills, we'll visit the Netherlands and Germany to learn about transportation by train and car, changing money, and settling in upon arrival.

programme.title: Rick Steves' Europe: Palestine
programme.desc: Exploring Palestine — the Muslim and Arab half of the Holy Land — we'll visit Jerusalem, harvest olives near Ramallah, follow pilgrims to Bethlehem, and bob in the Dead Sea.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Topkapi Palace Museum, Istanbul

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the American Museum of Natural History, New York
programme.desc: From a dinosaur embryo that solves a murder mystery to a spacecraft catching a comet’s tail, discover the secrets inside the American Museum of Natural History.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Imperial War Museum, London
programme.desc: From Churchill risking his life in the Blitz to 21st Century soldiers who become invisible, discover the secrets inside the Imperial War Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Chateau of Versailles, Paris

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the American Museum of Natural History, New York
programme.desc: From a dinosaur embryo that solves a murder mystery to a spacecraft catching a comet’s tail, discover the secrets inside the American Museum of Natural History.

programme.title: World's Greatest
programme.desc: In construction, only a few buildings can be groundbreaking. Vastly different in shape, size, and function, these diverse buildings prove there is no recipe for greatness, just the fundamental ingredients of vision, bravery, and imagination.

programme.title: World's Greatest

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Juan trata de sacar a Paula de su vida con dinero, pero ella no está dispuesta. Sofía intenta convencerla para que firme el acuerdo y se vayan las dos para siempre de la casa. Pedro y Julieta son descubiertos y se declara una guerra entre hermanos.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: José traiciona a su hermano por dinero e intenta aliarse con Pedro para quitarle la administración de la hacienda. Sofía hace revelaciones a Paula sobre la identidad de su padre, para empujarla a tomar las decisiones que ella está tramando.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: José reúne a todos los hermanos y se enfrenta a Juan porque quiere reemplazarlo. Julieta mantiene su posición con dignidad y no accede a hacer las paces con su marido, mientras Paula decide seguir insistiendo sin saber que una verdad la persigue.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: La envidia termina por separar y enfrentar a los hermanos del Monte. Julieta entra a la casa de Sofía y Paula para destrozarla, sus acciones descontroladas tienen como desenlace el regreso de ellas a la hacienda, pero nadie imagina lo que sucederá.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: En la celda, Antonia se corta las venas frente a Gabriela. Al llegar al hospital, quiere que Alejandro y David la ayuden a morir. Guerra está dispuesta a vengarse de Gabriela de la forma que sea. Lucho se entrega a la justicia y Ricardo lo defenderá.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Antonia escapa del hospital. Lagarto la sigue y termina malherido. Francisca tiene un mal presentimiento y mientras cocina con Cecilia, Antonia llega a su casa y las encañona. Lucho es puesto en libertad hasta que la jueza dicte sentencia.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Antonia y Gabriela se enfrentan en la mina. La vieja patrona le dispara a su propio hijo. Chacón aparece y cumple su venganza. Antonia queda cuadripléjica. Alejandro y Gabriela se casan. Nace Tomasito y trae una nueva esperanza a su hermana Lucía.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Hortencia escucha cuando Bustillo menciona que tiene que matar al viejo, ella le dice a Martín que no tome ninguna pastilla que le den. Los Reyes y las Elizondo subastan las joyas de Eduvina.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Raquel le aclara a Benito que toda la herencia va a ser para Ruth, aunque estén molestas y tengan diferentes opiniones sobre los Reyes. Fernando piensa en otras formas de presionar a Gabriela.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Gabriela grita para que Raquel la escuche y la ayude, la amiga va al sótano y la ve amordazada, al no poderla liberar huye y tiene un accidente fatal. Se cumple otro sueño premonitorio de Ruth.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Ruth está desconsolada por la muerte de sus padres, ahora más que nunca necesita el apoyo de sus amigos. Dínora tortura psicológicamente a Gabriela, le dice que por su culpa, Raquel murió.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Juan trata de sacar a Paula de su vida con dinero, pero ella no está dispuesta. Sofía intenta convencerla para que firme el acuerdo y se vayan las dos para siempre de la casa. Pedro y Julieta son descubiertos y se declara una guerra entre hermanos.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: José traiciona a su hermano por dinero e intenta aliarse con Pedro para quitarle la administración de la hacienda. Sofía hace revelaciones a Paula sobre la identidad de su padre, para empujarla a tomar las decisiones que ella está tramando.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: An organ grinder's fugitive monkey leads Fester to believe that he has turned Pugsley into a monkey. Morticia and Gomez treat the monkey as though he were their son, welcoming him to the dinner table and giving him Pugsley's chores.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's favorite charity is having an auction--so Morticia persuades her family to part with things to sell. Donations include Wednesday's headless doll, the old flogging table, a stuffed vulture and Uncle Fester's dynamite.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The Addams Family ignores notices that their house is to be condemned to make way for a freeway. When sudden explosions cannot be traced to any member of the family but, instead, to city workmen, Gomez is forced to consider moving the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's pen pal, Madelyn, is coming to visit. Fester panics, as he has described himself as handsome, heroic and romantic. Gomez and Morticia agree that all Fester needs is a toupee and they help him make several styles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez are worried about Cousin Itt because he spends his days sleeping and dreaming in his tiny room. They decide that Itt would make an excellent marriage counselor, and pretend to be a couple with a failing marriage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A recording company's platter of Lurch's gravelly voice brings a screaming mob of teenage fans to the Addams house. To calm the crowd, Lurch seats himself at the harpsichord and rewards his fans with a song to end all songs.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Taken in by a psychologist's pronouncement that the only happily married couples are those who fight members of the Addams household devise schemes to start a battle between Gomez (John Astin) and Morticia (Carolyn Jones).

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez decides to bolster Cousin Itt's failing ego by making him the star of a production aimed as a birthday surprise for Wednesday. He hires the great director, Eric von Bissell, who gives Itt elocution lessons, causing a Hollywood star complex.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While Morticia and Gomez are celebrating their 13th wedding anniversary, she tells Wednesday and Pugsley a bedtime story of how she and Gomez first met. In this episode, Carolyn Jones plays Morticia, Morticia as a 22-year-old, and sister Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley refuse to go to bed until they hear the rest of the courtship story. Morticia resumes the tale via flashback, including the ceremony beginning with Ophelia Frump, Morticia's balmy sister, as the bride.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Romance seems close for Thing, the Addams right-hand-in-a-box, when Gomez's aunt arrives for a visit accompanied by Lady Fingers, her handmaiden. Thing enjoys the visit most because it gives him a chance to hold hands with one of his own kind.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez visit Mayor Henson to complain that their property tax is ridiculously low. After the Mayor proves his incompetence by offering a refund, Gomez is persuaded to become a candidate for the office.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: During a welcome home party for Cousin Itt, Morticia notices that the diminutive guest of honor seems to be losing his hair. Uncle Fester experiments with his chemistry set to produce a concoction that grows hair and tries the remedy on Itt.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley return in tears from trick-or-treating because a neighbor has told them there is no such thing as a witch. Morticia and Gomez plan to prove to the children that they do exist--by summoning a witch to a séance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Determined to correct the dreadful literature that Wednesday and Pugsley are exposed to, Morticia sets out to create a new literary world. Gomez fears that his wife's first manuscript is so good, that once the publisher reads it he will lose her.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: In need of artistic fulfillment, Morticia takes up sculpting. An art critic views her first endeavor--a three-eyed Gomez statue--and clubs it with his cane. Gomez, who won't have Morticia's heart broken gets a seedy art dealer to buy it.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley copies one of his dad's old love letters and sends it to his teacher. Miss Dunbar comes to visit the Addams home and confesses to Gomez that no man has ever fallen so in love with her, leading Morticia to pretend to be the jealous wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Wednesday befriends a new boy her age, Robespierre Courtney, Morticia invites his parents, Mr. and Mrs. Henry Courtney to visit the Addams house for tea. Unbeknownst to them, the Courtney's are hoping to meet a number of the social set.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: There is a neighborhood burglar on the loose, and Morticia has reason to believe it could be Gomez. Morticia decides to probe his subconscious mind for a key to his criminality after she and Uncle Fester discover loot hidden in the storeroom.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's pet plant Cleopatra gobbles up her favorite photo of Gomez from the family album. When the original photographer is found and asked to make a duplicate picture, it is discovered that he is now with the Department of Motor Vehicles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez plays host to Don Xavier Molines, a family friend during his childhood in Spain, and his daughter Consuella. Morticia's hospitality is put to the test when Consuella reveals that she has been promised in marriage to Gomez since childhood.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Wednesday's and Pugsley's faith in Santa Claus is shaken, Uncle Fester is chosen to back up Santa in case the real St. Nick is too busy to come. However, Fester-Santa gets stuck in the chimney, so each of the other adults fills in for him.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Fester is so smitten upon receipt of a photo of his love, a bearded carnival lady, that he borrows stamp money to mail her a proposal. Morticia dons a beard and poses as the mother to convince Fester that he will have to work to support a wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Because she thinks Fester (Jackie Coogan) and Grandmama (Blossom Rock) are spoiling the children, Morticia (Carolyn Jones) hires a governess. Insulted, Fester paints a white line down the center of the Addams house, dividing it in half.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez see Fester conferring with TV muscleman Jack LaGrann (Jack LaLanne), and think that Fester is planning a television career. However, Uncle Fester confides to Lurch that he has to go on a secret diet and exercise.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez find Grandfather Pegleg's treasure map and summon Captain Grimby. They hope to charter his boat for the treasure hunt. But after meeting the Captain, Morticia is careful to keep the nature of the mission secret.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia Frump is madly in love with Horatio Bartholomew, the man who has everything, except the truth about her relatives. Morticia, not convinced by Bartholomew, persuades playboy Cousin Itt to stir the embers of his past romance with Ophelia.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams conquer their fears in Zambia, Africa when they plunge more than 250 feet over the Zambezi River, feed a trio of crocodiles and walk with lions through the jungle.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams travel to Paris where Racers soar high above the French countryside and "drop mics" with a popular French rapper.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: One Team risks falling to the back of the pack after taking a break to sight-see, and Racers take a big jump when faced with a Double Dutch Detour.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams hit the town in Krakow, Poland with local street musicians to earn a hard day's pay.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: With only six teams remaining, the competition heats up when Racers face a U-Turn, and some teams enjoy the sweet taste of victory after a candy making challenge.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Racers face a third U-turn for the first time in the show's history, and teams try to power through an exhausting, late night detour on their way to an Indian wedding.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The final four teams race through Hong Kong and Macau, China where they take part in a spectacular water show at The House of Dancing Water and compete for a chance to race in the final leg.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The final three teams race to Long Island, New York where, after five continents, 10 countries, and more than 34,000 miles, one will be crowned winner and awarded the $1 million prize.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: In a series first, 11 new teams of social media stars depart from their own homes all across the country and head for Mexico City, where they set off fireworks and dig deep at an archaeological Roadblock. .

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: For the first time ever, the Race travels to Colombia where Racers go mud-diving for emeralds in a volcano.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The race continues in Columbia, where claustrophobia could prevent a racer from going deep into the catacombs to retrieve their next clue.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: A romance blossoms between two racers, and teams are caught in one of the largest-ever footraces to the mat for first place.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The Race reaches new heights as teams climb 15,000 feet in the French Alps, and one team may be in jeopardy of elimination after dropping their clue down a mountain.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: For the first time in THE AMAZING RACE history, teams travel to Yerevan, Armenia, where an express pass is on the line for the winner of the leg.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: The men of Mayberry, after a slow start, accept the addition of a lovely manicurist to Floyd's barbershop.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A Mayberry resident is convinced that he is a jinx until Andy helps restore his selfconfidence.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: The small-town methods of Mayberry prove more effective than the attempts of the State Police in the capture of a criminal.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: After Opie finishes last at a track race, Andy struggles to teach his son what it means to be a good loser.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy’s diplomacy and engineering skills are required to help the Mayberry choir adjust to the recent addition of tone-deaf Barney Fife to the group.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy and Barney are hard pressed when Mayberry's guest of honor turns out to be a pickpocket.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy uses his wits to help a struggling salesman stay in Mayberry despite strong pressure from the competition.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Aunt Bee becomes warden for a day when she disciplines Otis Campbell after he is arrested for his usual drunken behavior.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy is forced to exert all his persuasiveness to get a farmer to take a tetanus shot.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy and Barney visit the big city and help to catch a notorious jewel thief in the process.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Aunt Bee begins dating the dry cleaner because she wants to give Andy space to pursue his own relationships.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney learns the hard way that three’s a crowd, when Andy and Mary Simpson try to find time alone together.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Floyd expands his barbershop with the addition of a second barber. The new barber turns out to be a gambling bookie that Barney and Andy must catch in the act.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy is put on trial for his law enforcement practices when a Raleigh newspaper reporter writes a damaging article about the lawman.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney's cousin Virgil gets over his awkwardness as soon as he learns that people have confidence in his ability.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: When Otis Campbell’s brother comes to visit, Andy agrees to make Otis a temporary deputy to cover the lie Otis told about his career.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy fears Opie has an imaginary friend when he starts telling tall tales.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy's girlfriend Peggy McMillan gets along fine with Andy until he discovers that her father is rich.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Mayberry's new mayor doesn't like Andy or the way he does his job.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Aunt Bee heads out of town for a few days, leaving Andy and Opie to take care of themselves. When Peggy volunteers to cook for them, Floyd tries to convince Andy that she's trying to catch a husband.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: The Mayberry mayor demands that Andy get a crime expert from the city to help solve several cow thefts.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney tries to set Andy up when he mistakenly perceives that Andy is suffering from a broken heart.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Deputy Barney Fife loses his self-confidence when two farmers ignore his warning.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: The Mayberry band, composed of more flats than sharps, gets ready for its annual trip to the state band competition.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Floyd the barber has misrepresented his worldly goods to a wealthy window, who decides to visit him.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie becomes jealous when his father appears to be paying special attention to a pretty girl -- even taking her fishing with them.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Three escaped female convicts imprison Barney Fife and Floyd the barber in a remote cabin.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Sneak away into the sounds of quiet waters, velvety green shrubs, and distant foothills. Bob Ross creates a perfect scene of relaxation.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Nicholas Hankins: Bob Ross' Unfinished Season
programme.desc: The glow of a midnight moon yields brilliant jewel tones in the surging surf of this dramatic Bob Ross seascape.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A painting to reflect the essence of fall, bursting forth in a profusion of brilliant colors as Bob Ross creates a haven of tranquility on canvas.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross paints a golden field of sparse pines and other greenery inside the unique shape of a tapered rectangle with cut-in corners.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Guest painter Steve Ross enhances the beauty of this lovely mountain scene with a splashing waterfall amidst lovely fall foliage.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Nicholas Hankins: Bob Ross' Unfinished Season
programme.desc: Ancient rocks, lapping waves and a serene beach are the perfect setting for a flock of seagulls to hunt for their lunch.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross will enchant you as he captures, on the canvas, a bright and cheery mountain scene right out of your dreams.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Create this extraordinary waterfall with Bob Ross and capture its intriguing magic in a painting you'll be proud to display anywhere.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A real Bob Ross classic - the majestic snow-covered mountain, rolling foothills, leafy trees and bushes, and serene lake.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Watch Bob Ross create a sweet little waterfall in the middle of a protective forest of glorious early autumn foliage.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Experience the serenity and silence of a fresh undisturbed snowfall with Bob Ross when he takes you to a lovely cabin deep in northern country.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: The field of snow and the little cabin yield to the bright, orange sun -- Bob Ross conveys harmony in this cold, but cozy scene.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross shows you how two beautiful mountain and evergreen oval scenes can be harmonized into one memorable masterpiece.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Walk along an old fence into the autumn country with Bob Ross and rest under the golden branches of a majestic shade tree.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: In an almost watercolor appearance, Bob Ross paints this amazing secluded waterfall masterpiece with interesting tree and rock formations.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Even the oval in this delightful Bob Ross cabin-by-the-river painting cannot contain all the succulent, glorious foliage!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Snow-covered trees and shrubs appear to be dressed in finest lace among the soft glows of winter. A unique Bob Ross painting!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Guest painter Steve Ross delights us with his oval landscape - blue skies, frosty mountain, fresh foothills, and polished lake.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross creates a fantastic and truly unique geometric illusion of depth in today's lovely vision of pastel mountain magic.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Come along with Bob Ross as he creates a winter moon hanging over a snow covered farm nestled among the trees - all on black canvas.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross paints an old weathered dwelling today, burrowed deep in the snow and lined with protective evergreens.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross uses a golden selection of colors in this gorgeous fall mountain scene, all within a cleverly different oval shape on the canvas.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: The undaunted splendor of sky, trees, and lake has never been more beautifully portrayed than in this joyful Bob Ross creation.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross creates palm trees that yield to stiff sea breezes as a sky of ominous clouds loom in the background.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross

programme.title: The Challenge
programme.desc: The final three teams learn that they will be competing in the first-ever final challenge to take place in the heart of a major city. With money on their minds, the players begin part one of the finale.

programme.title: The Challenge
programme.desc: The competitors must endure a series of demanding checkpoints as they battle each other all day - and all night - for their share of the $350,000 prize. One pair is crowned champions of Battle of the Bloodlines.

programme.title: The Challenge
programme.desc: Someone leaves notes in one of the women's rooms, causing speculation and distrust between them, Shane gets flirty with Victor, and Bananas uses an unusual approach during the Inquisition.

programme.title: The Challenge
programme.desc: The person who's leaving notes is revealed, one competitor gets too sick to compete, and TJ introduces the Mercenaries.

programme.title: The Challenge
programme.desc: The Mercenaries give the competitors a run for their money in Crazy 8, the Car Crash challenge proves dangerous for one player, and Cara Maria becomes suspicious of a rookie's moves.

programme.title: The Challenge
programme.desc: TJ disapproves of a competitor giving up during a challenge, alliances between women start falling apart, and Kayleigh surprises everyone by thinking for herself during an elimination.

programme.title: The Challenge
programme.desc: Devin spills the tea about a secret hookup in the house that shatters alliances and tests loyalties, Natalie and Nelson form a new bond, and TJ makes it clear he doesn't condone bullying.

programme.title: The Challenge
programme.desc: A competitor is shocked after being betrayed, setting off another betrayal at the hands of the Troika, and TJ brings back four Mercenaries to make the double elimination even harder.

programme.title: The Challenge

programme.desc: A member of the Troika punishes a competitor for being verbally aggressive during the Inquisition and sends him off to the elimination, and new vendettas are formed leading up to the final.

programme.desc: TJ reintroduces two Mercenaries with the power to launch a grenade if they win a card game against the final challengers, and a twist makes the final winner-take-all.

programme.title: The Challenge
programme.desc: Britni and Marie face off for the first time after insulting each other online, Kam gets kudos for her three elimination round wins, and Bananas and Tony reflect on their Challenge baggage.

programme.title: The Challenge

programme.desc: Cleveland Browns superfan Ray Prisby joins, as Emeril cooks up Ohio-inspired dishes with his signature flare, including crawfish pierogies with lemony brown butter and tarragon, catfish fingers with homemade tartar sauce, and fried hush puppies.

programme.title: Emeril Tailgates
